2000617.name: Shadow of the Far Sea
2000617.description: An epic weapon for the Stormblade class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000617.flavorText:
"In the dark of night, tides surge like a silent blade slicing through the deep.
Lightning cleaves the waves, leaving behind traces that vanish in an instant.
The scythe dances with the wind. What it reaps is not just mortal bodies, but the rifts of fate.
Each strike is a judgment jointly issued by the sea and storm.
And the echo that remains is but solemn silence within shattered tides."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VII")

2000618.name: Revelation of the Far Sea
2000618.description: An epic weapon for the Frost Mage class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000618.flavorText:
"Between the sea's breaths lies an untold truth.
It carves verses into the surging waves, writing them upon moonlit waters.
The tip of the staff catches a fleeting ripple, turning it into light.
Light pierces the mist, reaching even the deepest longing.
If you're willing to listen, the sea will offer you its answer."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths II")

2000619.name: Wish of the Far Sea
2000619.description: An epic weapon for the Wind Knight class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000619.flavorText:
"Its edge points straight into the distance, like tides rushing toward the endless sky.
It holds the sea's whispers, engraving vows between wind and water.
Every thrust is for the sake of protection, turning gales into unwavering creed.
And the knight's wish shall echo with the tide, reaching the farthest shore."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VIII")

2000620.name: Grace of the Far Sea
2000620.description: An epic weapon for the Verdant Oracle class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000620.flavorText:
"In the realm of ebbing tides, the sea leaves behind its final sigh.
The shattered reflections of starlight float on the water, like dreams yet unbroken.
Listen! Each rising tide is the heartbeat of a gentle and solemn deity.
The light surging through the ring soothes bloodstains, granting peace to weary souls."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths I")

2000621.name: Waiting of the Far Sea
2000621.description: An epic weapon for the Heavy Guardian class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000621.flavorText:
"The tide is not only gentle; it can become a stern barrier.
Great waves lie prostrate before the reefs, safeguarding the silence behind.
The blade's edge is like the spine of the earth, firm and unyielding.
Each impact echoes the ceaseless song of the ocean.
Guardian, the faith of the deep sea has long been bound to your soul."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths III")

2000622.name: Gaze of the Far Sea
2000622.description: An epic weapon for the Marksman class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000622.flavorText:
"The sea's gaze reaches farther than the wind, longer than the waves.
The bowstring draws tight, as if binding the skyline tightly.
The arrow carry the breath of the tide, crossing the boundary of water and sky.
It always finds its destination, reaching where the heart yearns."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths IV")

2000623.name: Vow of the Far Sea
2000623.description: An epic weapon for the Shield Knight class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000623.flavorText:
"Withdraw, withdraw, yet there always remain the unyielding reefs.
That is the ocean's silent vow, standing firmly on the shore forever.
The shield bears the waves, embracing the surge without resistance.
With every impact, it endures alongside the sea, without end.
It grants peace to the soul, so the brave may walk without fear.
In the eternal sound of the tide, protection becomes an endless poem."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths V")

2000624.name: Hymn of the Far Sea
2000624.description:
An epic weapon for the Beat Performer. It can be upgraded
to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000624.flavorText:
"Waves strike the reef like trembling strings.
Their sound rises from the surge, chasing the wind into the boundless sky.
Each chord is a secret the deep sea has yet to speak.
Stars and waterlight resonate, weaving a melody that surrounds the battlefield.
And those who listen shall find their way home within the hymn."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VI")

2000625.name: Fury of the Far Sea
2000625.description: An epic Twin Striker weapon.It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter breaking through to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
2000625.flavorText:
"When the tides converge within the abyss, they cleave through chaos, forging a fearless heart into the surging waves.
A vow of resolve is cast into the boundless depths.
Within that ceaseless tempest, only an unyielding soul may endure the deep sea's eternal solitude."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths IX")

2000626.name: Ember - Shadow of the Far Sea
2000626.description: An epic weapon for the Stormblade class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
2000626.flavorText:
"In the dark of night, tides surge like a silent blade slicing through the deep.
Lightning cleaves the waves, leaving behind traces that vanish in an instant.
The scythe dances with the wind. What it reaps is not just mortal bodies, but the rifts of fate.
Each strike is a judgment jointly issued by the sea and storm.
And the echo that remains is but solemn silence within shattered tides."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VII")

2000627.name: Ember - Revelation of the Far Sea
2000627.description: An epic weapon for the Frost Mage class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.

2001501.name: Unthinking Veiled Moon Blade
2001501.description: An epic weapon for the Stormblade.
2001501.flavorText: Divine Thunder Descends, like a heavenly punishment! Its blade is sharp enough to cut hair with a blow. An epic Stormblade weapon.

2001502.name: Staff of Starlight Fantasy
2001502.description: An epic weapon for the Frost Mage.
2001502.flavorText: Its texture is like jade, its feel like ice, an epic weapon for the Frost Mage.

2001503.name: Ragedream Axe
2001503.description:
An epic weapon for the Twin Striker class.

This weapon cannot be forged into Fury of the Far Sea.

2001504.name: Mirage Spear
2001504.description: An epic weapon for the Wind Knight.
2001504.flavorText: As gentle as a forest, as swift as the wind, immovable as a mountain, aggressive as fire, an epic weapon for the Wind Knight.

2001505.name: Voidforge Ring
2001505.description: An epic weapon for the Verdant Oracle.
2001505.flavorText: Surrounded by the forest, resurrected from ashes, an epic weapon for the Verdant Oracle.

2001506.name: Crushing Nightmare Blade
2001506.description: An epic weapon for Heavy Guardian.
2001506.flavorText: Turning rock into sand, gathering sand into a wall, steadfast protection, unwavering commitment! An epic weapon for the Heavy Guardian Class.

2001507.name: Phantomstar Bow
2001507.description: An epic weapon for the Marksman.
2001507.flavorText: Drawing a bow to its full moon, with energy piercing the rainbow, an epic weapon for the Marksman.

2001508.name: Oath of the Immortal Watch
2001508.description: An epic weapon for Shield Knight.
2001508.flavorText: Bear the burden and hold the sharp weapons. With a dazzling silver glow, this is an epic weapon for the Shield Knights.

2001509.name: Voidcall Movement
2001509.description: This epic weapon is forged for the Beat Performer.
2001509.flavorText: Emberstride Strings (Em), Cindercleave Edge (C), Gilded Pyre Chord (G), and Dawnforged Symphony (D)

Seems to grant higher Intellect.

[This gear's advanced attributes will not include Versatility.]
2050533.flavorText:
Handcrafted to perfection—Though devoid of rare attributes, every detail is imbued with the artisan's soul.

Forged by an unnamed hand with bold materials and exquisite detail, these earrings whisper of ubiquitous miracles woven into the fabric of the world.

Embedding a sigil into gear grants it the unique effects contained within the sigil.
Sigils can be used on: Helmet, Armor, Gauntlets, and Boots

8000001.name: Shadow of the Far Sea
8000001.description: An epic weapon for the Stormblade class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000001.flavorText:
"In the dark of night, tides surge like a silent blade slicing through the deep.
Lightning cleaves the waves, leaving behind traces that vanish in an instant.
The scythe dances with the wind. What it reaps is not just mortal bodies, but the rifts of fate.
Each strike is a judgment jointly issued by the sea and storm.
And the echo that remains is but solemn silence within shattered tides."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VII")

8000002.name: Revelation of the Far Sea
8000002.description: An epic weapon for the Frost Mage class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000002.flavorText:
"Between the sea's breaths lies an untold truth.
It carves verses into the surging waves, writing them upon moonlit waters.
The tip of the staff catches a fleeting ripple, turning it into light.
Light pierces the mist, reaching even the deepest longing.
If you're willing to listen, the sea will offer you its answer."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths II")

8000003.name: Wish of the Far Sea
8000003.description: An epic weapon for the Wind Knight class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000003.flavorText:
"Its edge points straight into the distance, like tides rushing toward the endless sky.
It holds the sea's whispers, engraving vows between wind and water.
Every thrust is for the sake of protection, turning gales into unwavering creed.
And the knight's wish shall echo with the tide, reaching the farthest shore."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VIII")

8000004.name: Grace of the Far Sea
8000004.description: An epic weapon for the Verdant Oracle class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000004.flavorText:
"In the realm of ebbing tides, the sea leaves behind its final sigh.
The shattered reflections of starlight float on the water, like dreams yet unbroken.
Listen! Each rising tide is the heartbeat of a gentle and solemn deity.
The light surging through the ring soothes bloodstains, granting peace to weary souls."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths I")

8000005.name: Waiting of the Far Sea
8000005.description: An epic weapon for the Heavy Guardian class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000005.flavorText:
"The tide is not only gentle; it can become a stern barrier.
Great waves lie prostrate before the reefs, safeguarding the silence behind.
The blade's edge is like the spine of the earth, firm and unyielding.
Each impact echoes the ceaseless song of the ocean.
Guardian, the faith of the deep sea has long been bound to your soul."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths III")

8000006.name: Gaze of the Far Sea
8000006.description: An epic weapon for the Marksman class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000006.flavorText:
"The sea's gaze reaches farther than the wind, longer than the waves.
The bowstring draws tight, as if binding the skyline tightly.
The arrow carry the breath of the tide, crossing the boundary of water and sky.
It always finds its destination, reaching where the heart yearns."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths IV")

8000007.name: Vow of the Far Sea
8000007.description: An epic weapon for the Shield Knight class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000007.flavorText:
"Withdraw, withdraw, yet there always remain the unyielding reefs.
That is the ocean's silent vow, standing firmly on the shore forever.
The shield bears the waves, embracing the surge without resistance.
With every impact, it endures alongside the sea, without end.
It grants peace to the soul, so the brave may walk without fear.
In the eternal sound of the tide, protection becomes an endless poem."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths V")

8000008.name: Hymn of the Far Sea
8000008.description:
An epic weapon for the Beat Performer. It can be upgraded
to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter upgrading to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000008.flavorText:
"Waves strike the reef like trembling strings.
Their sound rises from the surge, chasing the wind into the boundless sky.
Each chord is a secret the deep sea has yet to speak.
Stars and waterlight resonate, weaving a melody that surrounds the battlefield.
And those who listen shall find their way home within the hymn."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VI")

8000079.name: Fury of the Far Sea
8000079.description: An epic Twin Striker weapon.It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores as this season progresses.\nAfter breaking through to item level 180, it can be crafted at Lunel, an NPC of the Artisan Guild, into an "Ember - Far Sea" weapon at item level 220, which also activates the weapon's visual effects.\nThe gear Modification feature can be used to select up to 4 entry effects for "Ember - Far Sea" weapons.
8000079.flavorText:
"When the tides converge within the abyss, they cleave through chaos, forging a fearless heart into the surging waves.
A vow of resolve is cast into the boundless depths.
Within that ceaseless tempest, only an unyielding soul may endure the deep sea's eternal solitude."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths IX")

Each chord is a secret the deep sea has yet to speak.
Stars and waterlight resonate, weaving a melody that surrounds the battlefield.
And those who listen shall find their way home within the hymn."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VI")

8000090.name: Ember - Fury of the Far Sea
8000090.description: An epic Twin Stiker weapon. It can upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000090.flavorText:
"When the tides converge within the abyss, they cleave through chaos, forging a fearless heart into the surging waves.
A vow of resolve is cast into the boundless depths.
Within that ceaseless tempest, only an unyielding soul may endure the deep sea's eternal solitude."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths IX")

8000091.name: Ember - Shadow of the Far Sea
8000091.description: An epic weapon for the Stormblade class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000091.flavorText:
"In the dark of night, tides surge like a silent blade slicing through the deep.
Lightning cleaves the waves, leaving behind traces that vanish in an instant.
The scythe dances with the wind. What it reaps is not just mortal bodies, but the rifts of fate.
Each strike is a judgment jointly issued by the sea and storm.
And the echo that remains is but solemn silence within shattered tides."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VII")

8000092.name: Ember - Revelation of the Far Sea
8000092.description: An epic weapon for the Frost Mage class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000092.flavorText:
"Between the sea's breaths lies an untold truth.
It carves verses into the surging waves, writing them upon moonlit waters.
The tip of the staff catches a fleeting ripple, turning it into light.
Light pierces the mist, reaching even the deepest longing.
If you're willing to listen, the sea will offer you its answer."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths II")

8000093.name: Ember - Wish of the Far Sea
8000093.description: An epic weapon for the Wind Knight class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000093.flavorText:
"Its edge points straight into the distance, like tides rushing toward the endless sky.
It holds the sea's whispers, engraving vows between wind and water.
Every thrust is for the sake of protection, turning gales into unwavering creed.
And the knight's wish shall echo with the tide, reaching the farthest shore."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VIII")

8000094.name: Ember - Grace of the Far Sea
8000094.description: An epic weapon for the Verdant Oracle class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000094.flavorText:
"In the realm of ebbing tides, the sea leaves behind its final sigh.
The shattered reflections of starlight float on the water, like dreams yet unbroken.
Listen! Each rising tide is the heartbeat of a gentle and solemn deity.
The light surging through the ring soothes bloodstains, granting peace to weary souls."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths I")

8000095.name: Ember - Waiting of the Far Sea
8000095.description: An epic weapon for the Heavy Guardian class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000095.flavorText:
"The tide is not only gentle; it can become a stern barrier.
Great waves lie prostrate before the reefs, safeguarding the silence behind.
The blade's edge is like the spine of the earth, firm and unyielding.
Each impact echoes the ceaseless song of the ocean.
Guardian, the faith of the deep sea has long been bound to your soul."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths III")

8000096.name: Ember - Gaze of the Far Sea
8000096.description: An epic weapon for the Marksman class. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000096.flavorText:
"The sea's gaze reaches farther than the wind, longer than the waves.
The bowstring draws tight, as if binding the skyline tightly.
The arrow carry the breath of the tide, crossing the boundary of water and sky.
It always finds its destination, reaching where the heart yearns."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths IV")

8000097.name: Ember - Vow of the Far Sea
8000097.description: An epic weapon for the Shield Knight class. It can upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000097.flavorText:
"Withdraw, withdraw, yet there always remain the unyielding reefs.
That is the ocean's silent vow, standing firmly on the shore forever.
The shield bears the waves, embracing the surge without resistance.
With every impact, it endures alongside the sea, without end.
It grants peace to the soul, so the brave may walk without fear.
In the eternal sound of the tide, protection becomes an endless poem."
(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths V")

8000098.name: Ember - Hymn of the Far Sea
8000098.description: An epic Beat Performer weapon. It can be upgraded to higher levels using a few Glinting Stellar Cores during the current season.
8000098.flavorText:

Their sound rises from the surge, chasing the wind into the boundless sky.

(Excerpt from "Book of the Depths VI")
