156.description: Each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Haste increases the REG SPD of <linktext=1167><style="ItemQuality_5">Blade Intent</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>.

157.name: Moonstrike Spec
157.description:
Replaces Special Attack with Moonstrike, enhancing the ability.
Cast Moonstrike to gain 30 Blade Intent.

Frequent consumption of Thunder Sigils summons Moonblades to continuously attack the target. High Haste accelerates Moonblades' attacks. High Luck increases the frequency of Moonblades triggering Thunder Strike.

158.name: Divine Sickle
158.description:
Casting Storm Scythe 7 times triggers Divine Sickle.
Divine Sickle is guaranteed to Crit.
When Luck is between 28% and 45%, Divine Sickle's Final DMG increases by 150%, but requires 14 casts of Storm Scythe to trigger.
When Luck chance is above 45%, Final DMG increases by 275%, but requires 21 casts of Storm Scythe to trigger.

159.name: Moonlight Charge
159.description: If Luck chance exceeds <style="accent-gn">25%</style>, <linktext=1101><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonblades</style></linktext> trigger a Lucky Strike to gain <linktext=1106><style="ItemQuality_5">Charge Seed</style></linktext>. Otherwise, when <linktext=1101><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonblades</style></linktext> deal DMG, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">25%</style> chance to gain <linktext=1106><style="ItemQuality_5">Charge Seed</style></linktext>.

161.name: Thousand Thunder Flashes
161.description: Every <style="accent-gn">2</style> times <linktext=1100><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunderstrike</style></linktext> is triggered, the CD of <linktext=1505><style="ItemQuality_5">Stormflash</style></linktext> is reduced by <style="accent-gn">0.7s</style>.

162.name: Chaos Breaker
162.description: When <linktext=1505><style="ItemQuality_5">Stormflash</style></linktext> is activated, <linktext=1507><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonstrike</style></linktext> evolves into <linktext=1506><style="ItemQuality_5">Chaos Breaker</style></linktext>.

163.name: Enhanced Thunderstrike
163.description:
Increases the DMG dealt by Thunderstrike by 20%.
Each 1% Luck grants Thunderstrike 1% more DMG dealt.

164.name: Charge Catcher
164.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> enemy defeated grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1106><style="ItemQuality_5">Charge Seed</style></linktext> (effective within a team).

165.name: Thunderstrike Whisper
165.description: Increases the Thunder DMG <linktext=1100><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunderstrike</style></linktext> deals by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, yet <linktext=1100><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunderstrike</style></linktext> never deals Crit DMG.

166.name: Moonstrike Sharp Strike
166.description: When <linktext=1167><style="ItemQuality_5">Blade Intent</style></linktext> is at least <style="accent-gn">50</style>, <linktext=1507><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonstrike</style></linktext> and its enhanced skill (<linktext=1506><style="ItemQuality_5">Chaos Breaker</style></linktext>) are guaranteed to land a Crit.

167.name: Thunder Sigil Charm
167.description:
Increases Max Thunder Sigil by 1.
During Stormflash, each trigger of Storm Scythe extends its duration by 0.5s, up to 5s.

169.name: Raijin Dash Charge
169.description: When <linktext=1503><style="ItemQuality_5">Thundercut</style></linktext> triggers a Lucky Strike, grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1106><style="ItemQuality_5">Charge Seed</style></linktext>.

170.name: Moonblade Swift
170.description: <linktext=1101><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonblades</style></linktext> additionally deal <style="accent-gn">1</style> instance of Whirling DMG every <style="accent-gn">6s</style>. Each <style="accent-gn">2%</style> Haste reduces its CD by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>.

171.name: Thunder Might
171.description: During <linktext=1505><style="ItemQuality_5">Stormflash</style></linktext>, <linktext=1586><style="ItemQuality_5">Storm Scythe</style></linktext> will activate twice in succession.

172.name: Thunder Sigil Rewind
172.description: During <linktext=1504><style="ItemQuality_5">Volt Surge</style></linktext>, the return chance of Thunder Sigil Rewind doubles, but the damage bonus of <style="accent-gn">non-derivative</style> skills that consume <linktext=1104><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunder Sigil</style></linktext> is reduced from <style="accent-gn">25%</style> to <style="accent-gn">20%</style>.

202.name: Frost Curse Sigil
202.description: When a <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> deals DMG, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">5%</style> chance to <linktext=1171><style="ItemQuality_5">Frozen</style></linktext> the target.

203.name: Ice Revelation
203.description:
Summons 2 permanent Ice Crystal Cores that float beside you.
Ice Crystal Core
When Basic Attacks deal DMG, Ice Crystal Cores have a fixed 10% chance to fire 2 Ice Arrows.
Ice Arrow: Each arrow deals Magic DMG equal to 28% ATK to the target and grants 1 Frost Crystal (up to 2 Frost Crystals can be stored).

206.name: Tide Mastery
206.description: While casting <linktext=1509><style="ItemQuality_5">Frostbeam</style></linktext>, you can channel <linktext=1508><style="ItemQuality_5">Tidepool</style></linktext> and <linktext=1558><style="ItemQuality_5">Maelstrom</style></linktext>.

207.name: Crystal Resonance
207.description:
When Frostbeam deals DMG, it has a 30% fixed chance to make Ice Crystal Core fire an Ice Arrow. Up to 1 Ice Arrow can be fired every 0.5s.
The final DMG of the Ice Arrow is doubled (this also affects DMG triggered by the Frost Explosion talent).

208.name: Frost Explosion
208.description: When <style="accent-gn">Ice Arrows</style> fired by <style="accent-gn">Ice Crystal Cores</style> deal a Crit, they deal an additional instance of <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">28%</style> ATK. This DMG can trigger Lucky Strike.

211.name: Cold Wind Convergence
211.description:
When Frozen Gale hits a target (only triggers once when hitting multiple targets), it consumes all Frost Crystals to summon Icy Bolt, with the number of Icy Bolt equal to the consumed Frost Crystals.
Icy Bolt deals DMG, restores 5 Ice Energy, and reduces the Ice Energy cost of skills by 3% for the next 15s, stacking up to 6 times.

212.name: Frostbeam Spec
212.description:
Replaces Special Attack with ​Frostbeam​ and enhances the skill.
Every Frost Crystal increases ​Frostbeam​ DMG by 15%. Each 10% Mastery grants an additional 0.85% DMG bonus (up to 5%) and increases the Ice Energy consumed by 30%.
When ​Frostbeam​ hits a target, every 13 hits reduce the remaining CD of Permafrostby 1s (hitting multiple targets only counts once).

Consumes Ice Energy to channel Frostbeam continuously at the target. High Haste and Mastery greatly speed up its channeling while improving Ice Energy recovery.

214.name: Snow Shadow
214.description: For every <style="accent-gn">25</style> <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style> consumed, the CD of <linktext=1510><style="ItemQuality_5">Crystal Veil</style></linktext> -<style="accent-gn">1</style>s.

215.name: Frost Comet
215.description: When <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext> that consumes <linktext=1161><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Crystals</style></linktext> deals DMG, there is a fixed <style="accent-gn">21%</style> chance to summon <linktext=1165><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Comet</style></linktext>.

216.name: Frozen Stars
216.description: When <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext> triggers both a Crit and a Lucky Strike, <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">Meteor Storm</style></linktext>'s CD is immediately reset. If <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">Meteor Storm</style></linktext> is already off cooldown, <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">it</style></linktext> will be automatically cast (but this <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">Meteor Storm</style></linktext> will deal half damage). This effect can trigger up to 3 times within 1.5s (affected by Attack Speed).

217.name: Blizzard Dual Lances
217.description: Within <style="accent-gn">8s</style> after casting <linktext=1513><style="ItemQuality_5">Blizzard</style></linktext>, <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext> can fire an additional <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext> at another target near the original one.

219.name: Stormy Encounter
219.description: When <linktext=1510><style="ItemQuality_5">Crystal Veil</style></linktext> deals DMG, it has a fixed chance to reduce the CD of <linktext=1513><style="ItemQuality_5">Blizzard</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style>s. The chance equals half percentage of your Luck.

220.name: Shattering Strike
220.description: When <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">Meteor Storm</style></linktext> deals DMG, it causes <style="accent-gn">Ice Crystal Cores</style> to fire <style="accent-gn">Ice Arrows</style>. This effect can trigger up to once per <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">Meteor Storm</style></linktext> cast.

221.name: Glacier fury
221.description:
Consuming 15 Frost Crystals enhances the next Blizzard.
Blizzard: Bypasses the casting time and increases DMG dealt by 30%, and trigger Lucky Strike.

222.name: Icicle Volley
222.description: For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> casts of <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext>, a <linktext=1164><style="ItemQuality_5">Piercing Ice Lance</style></linktext> is launched forward.

223.name: Glazed Vastness
223.description: Ice skills deal <style="accent-gn">8%</style> more DMG to Elites and stronger targets.

224.name: Continuous Stream
224.description:
Dealing DMG triggers Trickle.
Trickle: Grants a 1% Ice damage bonus for 6s, stacking up to 5 times.

225.name: Boundless Frost
225.description:
Every 50 Ice Energy consumed grants 1 Frost Crystal.
Max Frost Crystal +3. Each possessed Frost Crystal increases Frostbeam DMG by 5%.

226.name: Frost Shock
226.description: When an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> or <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style> lands a Lucky Strike, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">30%</style> chance to trigger <linktext=1163><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Shock</style></linktext>, once every <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

227.name: Quick Frozen Blast
227.description: When an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> or <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style> deals DMG to a target with <linktext=1171><style="ItemQuality_5">Frozen</style></linktext>, it triggers <linktext=1163><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Shock</style></linktext>, once <style="accent-gn">per</style> second.

228.name: Icy Calm
228.description: Each additional target hit by an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> or <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style> grants a <style="accent-gn">2%</style> bonus to your highest stat among Mastery, Haste, Crit, or Luck for <style="accent-gn">5</style>s. Hitting more than 5 additional targets still only counts as <style="accent-gn">5</style>.

229.name: Instant Cooling
229.description: Every <style="accent-gn">35</style> <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style> consumed reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1511><style="ItemQuality_5">Meteor Storm</style></linktext> and <linktext=1514><style="ItemQuality_5">Frozen Gale</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1.3s</style>.

230.name: Cold Stream
230.description:
Max Ice Energy +25.
Every 1% Haste increases Ice Energy's auto REG SPD by 1%.

231.name: Frostjade Staff
231.description:
When Ice Arrow cast with Ice Crystal Core deals DMG, restores 1 Ice Energy.
In the Permafrost status, the recovery doubles.

233.name: Icicle Spec
233.description:
Further enhances Frost Lance.
When Frost Lance deals Crit DMG, there is a fixed 30% chance for Ice Crystal Cores to fire Ice Arrows.

Time your use of Ice Energy to chant and launch Frost Lance. Crit and Luck increase the chance to skip chanting and significantly boost the lance's DMG.

234.name: Frost Domain
234.description: The area of <linktext=1516><style="ItemQuality_5">Glacier Hymn</style></linktext> -<style="accent-gn">50%</style>. While within the domain, you gain a <style="accent-gn">25%</style> Ice bonus.

235.name: Cold Pulse
235.description:
Every 50 hits by Frostbeam trigger a Cold Pulse.
For each additional enemy hit, increases Cold Pulse DMG by 20%, up to 500%.

237.name: Secondary Amp
237.description: Boost the highest stat among the following <style="accent-gn">5</style> stats: Crit, Haste, Luck, Mastery, and Versatility by <style="accent-gn">3.5%</style> as a final value.

240.name: Endless Cold
240.description:
Every 20 Frost Crystals consumed grants Endless Cold effect.
Endless Cold: For 10s, increases Meteor Storm DMG by 150%, and removes its CD and Ice Energy cost. During this period, Ice Arrows triggered by Meteor Storm cannot produce Frost Crystal.
When Endless Cold is triggered during Permafrost, enter the Endless Cold state after the effect of Permafrost ends. If the number of Frost Crystals consumed during this period exceeds 20, proportionally increase the final damage dealt by Meteor Storm (up to 100%).

242.name: Freezing Meteor Storm
242.description:
When Meteor Storm deals damage, 20% chance to apply Frozen to the target.
Throughout the duration of Permafrost, when Frost Lance and Meteor Storm critically hit, extends the duration of Permafrost by 0.5s, up to 5s of extension.

243.name: Energy Saving
243.description:
When consuming Frost Crystal to cast Frost Lance, refunds 50% of the Ice Energy consumed after the cast.
When casting Frost Lance without consuming Frost Crystal, an additional 50% of the Ice Energy consumed is deducted after the cast.

244.name: Frost Blade
244.description: <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lances</style></linktext> that consume <linktext=1161><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Crystal</style></linktext> deal <style="accent-gn">30%</style> more DMG.

245.name: Deep Cold Magic Spear
245.description:
Frost Lance deals 70% more DMG.
Frost Lance costs 100% more time to use.

246.name: Meteor Storm Expansion
246.description:
Meteor Storm hit count +1.
Meteor Storm gains 10% Ice Bonus.

247.name: Frost Lance Crit
247.description: <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext> deals <style="accent-gn">1.5%</style> more Crit DMG. The effect lasts <style="accent-gn">6s</style> and stacks up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times.

248.name: Infusion Sublimation
248.description:
Increases Max Frost Crystal by 1.
During Permafrost, Ice ATK increases by 150.
When Permafrost ends, your Frost Crystal resets to the amount you had before the activation of Permafrost.

249.name: Deadly Frost Lance
249.description: <linktext=1512><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Lance</style></linktext> deals <style="accent-gn">20%</style> more DMG to targets with HP less than <style="accent-gn">35%</style>

250.name: Critical Cold
250.description:
During Permafrost, increases Crit DMG dealt by 15%.
During Permafrost, increases allies' critical rate by 3%.

252.name: Sharp Blizzard
252.description:
Increases the critical rate of Blizzard by 50%.
Increases the Crit DMG of Blizzard by 15%.

253.name: Frost Crystal Empowerment
253.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> <linktext=1161><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Crystal</style></linktext> consumed increases <style="accent-gn">Intellect</style> by <style="accent-gn">55</style>. This effect lasts <style="accent-gn">10</style>s and stacks up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

254.name: Frost Assault
254.description: <linktext=1513><style="ItemQuality_5">Blizzard</style></linktext> reduces the Ice Resistance of targets hit by <style="accent-gn">10%</style>. The effect lasts <style="accent-gn">10s</style> and does not stack, and only works on your own.

255.name: Luck Damage
255.description:
Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier +15%.
Every 2% Luck grants 1% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier.

256.name: Cold Retention
256.description: In the <linktext=1515><style="ItemQuality_5">Permafrost</style></linktext> status, the cost of <linktext=1509><style="ItemQuality_5">Frostbeam</style></linktext> decreases by <style="accent-gn">25%</style>.

257.name: Frost Revelation
257.description: The first hit of <linktext=1508><style="ItemQuality_5">Tidepool</style></linktext> on the target grants <style="accent-gn">5</style> <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style>. Each additional <linktext=1161><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Crystal</style></linktext> increases <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style> restored by <style="accent-gn">10</style>.

258.name: Law of Energy Surge
258.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> <style="accent-gn">Ice Arrows</style> shot increases the DMG of your next <linktext=1514><style="ItemQuality_5">Frozen Gale</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">200%</style> for <style="accent-gn">30s</style>. Additionally, casting <linktext=1514><style="ItemQuality_5">Frozen Gale</style></linktext> grants the <linktext=1130><style="ItemQuality_5">Law of Energy Surge</style></linktext>.

259.name: Power of Ice Crystals
259.description: When <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style> is above <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, deals <style="accent-gn">8%</style> more Ice damage.

260.name: Ice Crystal Recovery
260.description: When <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style> is below <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, enhances the recovery rate of <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style> by <style="accent-gn">10%</style>.

261.name: Rapid Ice Arrow
261.description: During <linktext=1515><style="ItemQuality_5">Permafrost</style></linktext>, <linktext=1509><style="ItemQuality_5">Frostbeam</style></linktext> fires <style="accent-gn">2</style> additional <style="accent-gn">Ice Arrows</style> generated by <style="accent-gn">Ice Crystal Core</style>.

262.name: Endless Tide
262.description: During <linktext=1515><style="ItemQuality_5">Permafrost</style></linktext>, each <style="accent-gn">Ice Arrow</style> triggered by <style="accent-gn">Ice Crystal Core</style> extends the duration of <linktext=1515><style="ItemQuality_5">Permafrost</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

263.name: Frost Tide
263.description: When dealing DMG, <linktext=1509><style="ItemQuality_5">Frostbeam</style></linktext> has a fixed <style="accent-gn">20%</style> chance to grant <linktext=1161><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Crystal</style></linktext>. If Max <linktext=1161><style="ItemQuality_5">Frost Crystal</style></linktext> is reached, grants <style="accent-gn">5%</style> bonus Ice damage dealt instead for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

264.name: Ray Mastery I
264.description:
Frostbeam deals 2% more Ice damage.
Frostbeam deals 5% more Ice damage to the main target.

265.name: Wide Area Ice Arrow
265.description: Every <style="accent-gn">10</style> hits of <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> allows <style="accent-gn">Ice Crystal Core</style> to fire <style="accent-gn">Ice Arrow</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">0.5</style>s).

266.name: Intellect Ice Crystal
266.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> <style="accent-gn">Intellect</style> grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> Max <style="accent-gn">Ice Energy</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">100</style> from this source.

267.name: Quick Chant
267.description:
Increases Haste by 2500.
During Permafrost, Casting SPD increases by 15%.

268.name: Sharp Ice Arrow
268.description:
Ice Arrows from Ice Crystal Core are guaranteed to Crit.
Increases the Crit DMG of Ice Arrows from Ice Crystal Core by 10%.

269.name: Ray's Swan Song
269.description: When dealing DMG, <linktext=1509><style="ItemQuality_5">Frostbeam</style></linktext> gains a fixed <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to double <style="accent-gn">Mastery</style> for 3s (which can only be triggers once on multiple hits).

301.name: Swift Turn
301.description: For every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Haste, gains <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Attack SPD.

302.name: Infernal Combo
302.description: When <style="accent-gn">Special Attacks</style> or <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> deal damage, grants <linktext=1211><style="ItemQuality_5">Infernal Combo</style></linktext> (triggers only once when hitting multiple targets).

303.name: Crimson Lotus
303.description:
Gain adaptive effects when Infernal Combo reaches max stacks:

Formless Spec: ATK +8%.
Crimson Spec: Crimson Recovery effect +10%.

304.name: Crimson Flame Pursuit
304.description: <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> hits cause the target to take +<style="accent-gn">2.5%</style> DMG. The effect lasts <style="accent-gn">8</style>s and stacks up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

306.name: Crimson Lotus Duality
306.description:
Each stack of Infernal Combo grants effects based on the relationship between Luck Chance and Crit Chance:

When Luck Chance is greater than or equal to Crit Chance, each stack of Infernal Combo grants 1.6% Lucky Strike Multiplier.
When Crit Chance is greater than Luck Chance, each stack of Infernal Combo grants 1.2% Crit DMG.

307.name: Flame Soul Seal
307.description:
Flame Soul cap +50.
Every 50 Flame Soul gained triggers Infernal Combo.

308.name: Wild Soul - Swift
308.description: When <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> reaches <style="accent-gn">300</style> points, the effect of the talent <linktext=1211><style="ItemQuality_5">Infernal Combo</style></linktext> is increased by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

310.name: Crimson Lotus Ember Epiphany
310.description: While in the <linktext=1211><style="ItemQuality_5">Infernal Combo</style></linktext> state, the <linktext=1218><style="ItemQuality_5">Flame Suppression</style></linktext> effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

311.name: Soaring Crimson Flame Pursuit
311.description:
Enhances Crimson Flame Pursuit based on the target's lost HP:

When the target's HP is below 80%, enhances the base effect by 30%.
The lower the target's HP, the higher the bonus, up to a maximum enhancement of 100% when the target's HP drops to 30%.

312.name: Formless Expertise Spec
312.description:
By using different Special Attacks and Expertise Skills, the Formless level can be raised from E to S (a total of 6 levels). During its 8s duration, each 1 level grants Blazing Assault, Rage Cleave, and Axe Wind a 2% CD Speed increase.

Trigger Formless effects to accelerate CDs, chain Blazing Assault to boost Expertise Skill DMG, and combine with the core Formless Flame Slash mechanic to deal massive combo DMG.

313.name: Blazing Pact
313.description: After casting <linktext=1622><style="ItemQuality_5">Blazing Assault</style></linktext>, the next <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> deals +<style="accent-gn">20%</style> Final DMG, but its Crit Chance is halved.

314.name: Soaring Flame
314.description:
After gaining Formless 6 times or activating Wasteland's End, Blazing Ascension evolves into Soaring Flame.
Gains Blaze after casting Soaring Flame.

315.name: Time Wheel Rewind
315.description: When <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> is obtained, the remaining CD of the skill with the longest current CD among <linktext=1622><style="ItemQuality_5">Blazing Assault</style></linktext>, <linktext=1623><style="ItemQuality_5">Rage Cleave</style></linktext>, and <linktext=1624><style="ItemQuality_5">Axe Wind</style></linktext> is reduced by <style="accent-gn">1</style>.<style="accent-gn">5</style>s.

316.name: Inferno
316.description: In <linktext=1212><style="ItemQuality_5">Blaze</style></linktext> state, <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skills</style> inflict <linktext=1213><style="ItemQuality_5">Burn</style></linktext> when they hit a target.

317.name: Inferno Explosion
317.description: When a target is inflicted with <linktext=1213><style="ItemQuality_5">Burn</style></linktext>, there is a <style="accent-gn">30%</style> fixed chance to accumulate <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <style="accent-gn">Wildfire</style> that lasts for <style="accent-gn">10</style>s. When <style="accent-gn">Wildfire</style> reaches <style="accent-gn">12</style> stacks, it triggers <linktext=1214><style="ItemQuality_5">Explosion</style></linktext> and clears <style="accent-gn">Wildfire</style> stacks.

318.name: Lucky Explosion
318.description:
Burn can trigger Lucky Strike.
Based on the target's current Burn stacks, increases Explosion damage. Each additional 1 stack of Burn increases Explosion damage by 5%.

319.name: Wasteland Raid
319.description: During <linktext=1625><style="ItemQuality_5">Wasteland's End</style></linktext>, triggering a Lucky Strike with <linktext=1623><style="ItemQuality_5">Rage Cleave</style></linktext> or <linktext=1624><style="ItemQuality_5">Axe Wind</style></linktext> reduces the charge time of <linktext=1622><style="ItemQuality_5">Blazing Assault</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style>s.

320.name: Time Wheel Lucky Soul
320.description: Each <style="accent-gn">1</style> level of the <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> effect increases Lucky Strike DMG by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>.

321.name: Time Wheel Agile Soul
321.description: Each <style="accent-gn">1</style> level of the <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> effect grants <style="accent-gn">2.5%</style> <style="accent-gn">Strength</style>.

322.name: Returning Soul
322.description: <linktext=1622><style="ItemQuality_5">Blazing Assault</style></linktext> restores <style="accent-gn">5%</style> of lost <style="accent-gn">Flame Soul</style>. When <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> is at S level, enhances recovery effect to <style="accent-gn">10%</style>.

323.name: Double Inferno
323.description:
Axe Wind applies 3 stacks of Burn to hit targets.
At S Formless level, targets hit by Axe Wind accumulate 1 stack of Wildfire that lasts for 10s. When Wildfire reaches 12 stacks, it triggers Explosion and clears Wildfire stacks.

324.name: Hellfire Meteor
324.description: In the <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> S-Rank state, each cast of <linktext=1623><style="ItemQuality_5">Rage Cleave</style></linktext> summons <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1215><style="ItemQuality_5">Hellfire Meteor</style></linktext> at the primary target's location.

326.name: Wasteland Finale
326.description: Gains <style="accent-gn">25%</style> Fire Bonus for <style="accent-gn">15</style>s after casting Ultimate.

327.name: Expertise Formless Flame Slash
327.description: <linktext=1623><style="ItemQuality_5">Rage Cleave</style></linktext>, <linktext=1622><style="ItemQuality_5">Blazing Assault</style></linktext>, and <linktext=1624><style="ItemQuality_5">Axe Wind</style></linktext> can trigger <linktext=1216><style="ItemQuality_5">Formless Flame Slash</style></linktext>.

328.name: Formless Flame Slash Luck
328.description: Every </linktext><style="accent-gn">1%</style> Luck increases the trigger chance of <linktext=1216><style="ItemQuality_5">Formless Flame Slash</style> stages <style="accent-gn">1</style> to <style="accent-gn">3</style> by <style="accent-gn">0.2%</style>/<style="accent-gn">0.1%</style>/<style="accent-gn">0.05%</style> respectively, but the Crit Rate of <linktext=1216><style="ItemQuality_5">Formless Flame Slash</style></linktext> is halved.

329.name: Formless Combo
329.description: For every <style="accent-gn">5</style> hits an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> deals to the main target, it grants a buff that increases the Lucky Strike Multiplier by <style="accent-gn">27%</style> and reduces Lucky Strike Crit Rate by <style="accent-gn">20%</style> for the next <style="accent-gn">8s</style>. This effect stacks up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

330.name: Formless Flame Slash - Break
330.description:
Formless Flame Slash can trigger Lucky Strike.
Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier +5%. Every 1% Luck grants 0.8% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier.

333.name: Formless Flame Slash Attack Break
333.description: <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style>, <linktext=1619><style="ItemQuality_5">Blazing Ascension</style></linktext>, and <linktext=1620><style="ItemQuality_5">Soaring Flame</style></linktext> can trigger <linktext=1216><style="ItemQuality_5">Formless Flame Slash</style></linktext>.

334.name: Lucky Blade Combo
334.description: <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skills</style> ignore <style="accent-gn">35%</style> of the target's Armor.

335.name: Formless Flame Slash Combo
335.description: Each <style="accent-gn">1</style> level of the <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> effect provides <style="accent-gn">2%</style> <linktext=1216><style="ItemQuality_5">Formless Flame Slash</style></linktext> DMG.

337.name: Instant Wasteland
337.description: When <style="accent-gn">Formless</style> is obtained, the remaining CD of <linktext=1625><style="ItemQuality_5">Wasteland's End</style></linktext> is reduced by <style="accent-gn">0</style>.<style="accent-gn">5</style>s or its duration is extended by <style="accent-gn">0</style>.<style="accent-gn">5</style>s (total extended duration cannot exceed <style="accent-gn">5</style>s).

338.name: Burning Attack
338.description: Fire Bonus +<style="accent-gn">8%</style> when attacking Elite or higher targets.

339.name: Varied Strikes
339.description: For each additional target hit by an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style>, DMG dealt +<style="accent-gn">10%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">60%</style>.

341.name: Stellar Spark
341.description: <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> DMG increases Fire ATK by <style="accent-gn">22</style> for the next <style="accent-gn">10</style>s. Stacks up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times.

342.name: Crimson Expertise Spec
342.description:
Gains the Crimson Recovery effect: When hitting the main target (excluding Wildfire Dance), 20% of the DMG dealt is converted into Crimson Soul Gauge (Crimson Soul Gauge value cannot exceed Max HP). When Flame Soul is insufficient, 25% of the Crimson Soul Gauge value can be consumed to extend the duration of Wildfire Dance by 0.8s.

Build the gauge quickly through Crimson Recovery, then leverage high Attack SPD to trigger Wildfire Dance frequently. Use this as the core mechanic and combine it with other skill effects to unleash massive DMG within the burst window.

343.name: Soul Flame
343.description: For every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> <style="accent-gn">Crimson Soul Gauge</style> charged, immediately gains a buff: Increases ATK bonuses from all sources by <style="accent-gn">2%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5</style>s. This effect can stack up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

344.name: Raging Flame Sharpness I
344.description: For every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Max HP or <style="accent-gn">Crimson Soul Gauge</style> lost, a stack of a buff is immediately gained: Crit Chance from all sources is increased by <style="accent-gn">2.5%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5</style>s. This effect can stack up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

345.name: Crimson Earth - Flame Soul
345.description:
While within Crimson Earth, Flame Soul recovery efficiency +30%.
While within Crimson Earth, Wildfire Dance DMG +50%.

346.name: Crimson Earth - Swift
346.description: Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Attack SPD increases the <style="accent-gn">Crimson Recovery</style> effect by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> while within <style="accent-gn">Crimson Earth</style>.

347.name: Crimson Earth Meteor I
347.description: Every <style="accent-gn">2</style> casts of <linktext=1627><style="ItemQuality_5">Unbound Meteor</style></linktext> cause <linktext=1627><style="ItemQuality_5">Unbound Meteor</style></linktext> to evolve into <linktext=1628><style="ItemQuality_5">Falling Hellfire</style></linktext>.

348.name: Raging Flame Sharpness II
348.description: Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Haste grants <style="accent-gn">0.5%</style> <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> CD Boost.

349.name: Crimson Earth Meteor II
349.description: <linktext=1627><style="ItemQuality_5">Unbound Meteor</style></linktext> and its enhanced skill (<linktext=1628><style="ItemQuality_5">Falling Hellfire</style></linktext>) gain <style="accent-gn">15%</style> Fire Bonus. This is increased by an additional <style="accent-gn">15%</style> within <style="accent-gn">Crimson Earth</style>.

350.name: Destined Meteor
350.description: Casting <linktext=1630><style="ItemQuality_5">Flowing Splendor Slash</style></linktext>, <linktext=1627><style="ItemQuality_5">Unbound Meteor</style></linktext>, and its enhanced skill (<linktext=1628><style="ItemQuality_5">Falling Hellfire</style></linktext>) consumes up to <style="accent-gn">2</style> stacks of <linktext=1211><style="ItemQuality_5">Infernal Combo</style></linktext>. Each stack of <linktext=1211><style="ItemQuality_5">Infernal Combo</style></linktext> grants that skill a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Fire Bonus.

352.name: Hellfire Manifestation
352.description: While <linktext=1629><style="ItemQuality_5">Endless Hellfire</style></linktext> is active, the <style="accent-gn">Crimson Recovery</style> effect is doubled and the final consumption of the <style="accent-gn">Crimson Soul Gauge</style> is reduced by half.

353.name: Crimson Focus
353.description: For every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Attack SPD exceeding <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, <style="accent-gn">0.2%</style> <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> DMG is provided.

354.name: Flowing Splendor Rotation
354.description:
After casting Flowing Splendor Slash, Wildfire Dance DMG is increased by50% for 5s.
Flowing Splendor Slash charge count +1.

355.name: Instant Flowing Splendor
355.description: When <linktext=1621><style="ItemQuality_5">Frenzied Slash</style></linktext> deals DMG, there is a <style="accent-gn">15%</style> fixed chance to grant <linktext=1630><style="ItemQuality_5">Flowing Splendor Slash</style></linktext> <style="accent-gn">1</style> charge and cause its next cast to consume no <style="accent-gn">Flame Soul</style>.

356.name: Ultimate Hellfire
356.description:
Activating Endless Hellfire immediately grants 5 stacks of Infernal Combo, which are not consumed while it is active.
While Endless Hellfire is active, Strength +15%.

357.name: Crimson Crit
357.description: When <style="accent-gn">Crimson Soul Gauge</style> is charged above <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, Fire ATK +<style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

358.name: Crimson Pierce
358.description: When dealing Crit DMG, ignores <style="accent-gn">22%</style> of the target's Armor.

359.name: Unbound Meteor Combo
359.description:
Falling Hellfire is enhanced into a continuous three-hit strike form.
Every 1% Crimson Soul Gauge increases Falling Hellfire DMG by 1%.

360.name: Crimson Epiphany
360.description: Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Mastery grants <style="accent-gn">2%</style> <style="accent-gn">Crimson Recovery</style> final effect.

361.name: Wildfire Dance Final Slash
361.description:
After Wildfire Dance deals Crit DMG 10 times (hits on multiple targets count as one), it triggers a Final Slash that deals 500% ATK as Attack DMG to enemies.
Each Crit DMG instance dealt by Wildfire Dance grants the Final Slash a 3% Final DMG Bonus (up to a maximum of 100%).

362.name: Wildfire Formless Flame Slash
362.description:
Wildfire Dance can trigger Formless Flame Slash, but can no longer trigger Lucky Strikes.
The damage multiplier of Formless Flame Slash is adjusted to the skill multiplier that triggered it * (30% + Crit%).

363.name: Wild Slash Combo
363.description: Each time <linktext=1626><style="ItemQuality_5">Wildfire Dance</style></linktext> deals DMG <style="accent-gn">1</style> time, it grants the next <linktext=1627><style="ItemQuality_5">Unbound Meteor</style></linktext>, <linktext=1628><style="ItemQuality_5">Falling Hellfire</style></linktext>, or <linktext=1630><style="ItemQuality_5">Flowing Splendor Slash</style></linktext> a <style="accent-gn">2.5%</style> Final DMG Bonus (up to a maximum of <style="accent-gn">100%</style>). Casting any of these skills clears this bonus.

364.name: Arcane Wildfire Bloodline
364.description: When <linktext=1626><style="ItemQuality_5">Wildfire Dance</style></linktext> deals DMG, there is a fixed chance of <style="accent-gn">12%</style> + Haste% / <style="accent-gn">2</style>.<style="accent-gn">5</style> to gain <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <style="accent-gn">Crimson Bloodline</style>. When <style="accent-gn">Crimson Bloodline</style> reaches <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, it triggers <linktext=1217><style="ItemQuality_5">Great Crimson Lotus</style></linktext> and clears all <style="accent-gn">Crimson Bloodline</style> stacks.

366.name: Arcane Raging Flame
366.description: Every <style="accent-gn">15%</style> <style="accent-gn">Crimson Soul Gauge</style> charged reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1629><style="ItemQuality_5">Endless Hellfire</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">0.5</style>s. Every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> of Haste reduces it by an additional <style="accent-gn">0.1</style>s, up to <style="accent-gn">1</style>s.

400.name: Swift Shadow
400.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> points of <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> consumed reduces the CD of <linktext=1523><style="ItemQuality_5">Spiral Thrust</style></linktext>, <linktext=1522><style="ItemQuality_5">Breach Pursuit</style></linktext>, and <linktext=1524><style="ItemQuality_5">Falcon Toss</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style>s.

402.name: Vulnerable Strike
402.description:
Dealing DMG grants a fixed 30% chance to apply Vulnerability to the enemy.
Vulnerability: Increases the DMG you deal to the target by 10% for 5s.

405.name: Wind Rift Diffusion
405.description: <style="accent-gn">Expertise</style> and <style="accent-gn">Ultimates</style> deal <style="accent-gn">10%</style> more DMG to targets inflicted with <linktext=1153><style="ItemQuality_5">Rend</style></linktext>, and when hitting <linktext=1153><style="ItemQuality_5">Rend</style></linktext> targets, deal <style="accent-gn">1</style> additional hit of <style="accent-gn">75%</style> DMG.

406.name: Wind Tear
406.description: When <linktext=1517><style="ItemQuality_5">Gale Thrust</style></linktext> deals DMG, apply <linktext=1153><style="ItemQuality_5">Rend</style></linktext> to targets.

407.name: Quickshot Meteor
407.description:
Gale Thrust is enhanced, increasing hit counts by 2.
Reduces Gale Thrust's Courage consumption by 20%.

410.name: Swift Blade
410.description: When <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext> deals DMG, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">7%</style> chance to evolve <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> into <linktext=1592><style="ItemQuality_5">Swift Blade</style></linktext>.

411.name: Zephyr Waltz Agility
411.description: Additional <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> recovery: Recovers <style="accent-gn">1</style> extra point of <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> per second for every <style="accent-gn">2</style> stacks of <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext>.

412.name: Wind Chaser
412.description: During the casting of <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext>, for every <style="accent-gn">20</style> points of <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> consumed, increase the DMG of <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">4%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">20%</style>.

413.name: Vortex Strike
413.description: After every <style="accent-gn">2</style> casts of <linktext=1591><style="ItemQuality_5">Drake Cannon</style></linktext>, your <linktext=1523><style="ItemQuality_5">Spiral Thrust</style></linktext> evolves into <linktext=1590><style="ItemQuality_5">Vortex Strike</style></linktext>.

414.name: Instantaneous Crit
414.description: While <linktext=1157><style="ItemQuality_5">Chasing Step</style></linktext> is active, <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> and <linktext=1521><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp Impact</style></linktext> have their Crit Chance doubled. Additionally, for <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> and <linktext=1521><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp Impact</style></linktext>, every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> excess Crit is converted into <style="accent-gn">3%</style> Crit DMG for the respective skill.

416.name: Spear Thrust
416.description:
When Skyfall lands a Lucky Strike, it triggers Spear Thrust, once every 2s.
Dealing DMG with Spear Thrust restores 8 points of Courage. This effect triggers only once, even if multiple targets are hit.

419.name: Air Dance Strike
419.description:
Sharp Impact and its enhanced skill (Typhoon: Sharp Impact) increase the Courage restored by the next ​Galeform​ by 50%.
Casting Sharp Impact immediately grants 3 Sharp, and casting its enhanced skill Typhoon: Sharp Impact immediately grants 6 Sharp.

421.name: Tornado Dance
421.description: During <linktext=1187><style="ItemQuality_5">Wind Fury</style></linktext>, DMG dealt by <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> and <linktext=1589><style="ItemQuality_5">Azure Sever</style></linktext> triggers <linktext=1158><style="ItemQuality_5">Tornado</style></linktext> (triggered at most once when hitting multiple targets).

422.name: Chasing Step
422.description:
When Skyfall or Falcon Toss deals a Crit or Lucky Strike, they trigger Chasing Step.
When Skyfall or Falcon Toss trigger a Crit and Lucky Strike simultaneously, they grant 2 stacks of Chasing Step.

423.name: Divine Wind Support
423.description: When <linktext=1524><style="ItemQuality_5">Falcon Toss</style></linktext> and its enhanced skill (<linktext=1589><style="ItemQuality_5">Azure Sever</style></linktext>), or <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> hits <style="accent-gn">1</style> target, the DMG gains a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Wind bonus.

424.name: Combat Expertise
424.description: As the battle goes on, grants continuously increasing ATK. Every <style="accent-gn">10</style>s, ATK +<style="accent-gn">2.5%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">10%</style>. Cleared after battle.

425.name: Momentum Surge
425.description: Increases <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext> effect by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>, and for <style="accent-gn">each</style> enemy within <style="accent-gn">12m</style>, additionally increases by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">3%</style>.

427.name: Catcher
427.description: In combat, for every <style="accent-gn">1</style> enemy target defeated (party-wide effect), ATK +<style="accent-gn">65</style> for <style="accent-gn">30</style>s, up to <style="accent-gn">650</style>.

428.name: Wind Split Technique
428.description: When <linktext=1153><style="ItemQuality_5">Rend</style></linktext> deals DMG, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">50%</style> chance to grant <style="accent-gn">2</style> points of <style="accent-gn">Courage</style>.

429.name: Tempestrike
429.description:
When Galeform ends, it applies the Tempestrike.
Every 50 points of Courage or 3 points of Sharp consumed during Galeform extends the duration of Tempestrike by 1s.

430.name: Divine Concealment
430.description: Consuming <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> increases Haste by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> and Speed by <style="accent-gn">2%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5</style>s, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

432.name: Skyward Spec
432.description:
Replaces Special Attack with Skyfall and enhances the skill.
When having Sharp, gains ATK based on the max number of Sharp.

Skyfall and Instant Edge can chain together, skipping the aerial cast delay. High Luck and critical rate enable Skyfall to trigger a low-cost Instant Edge.

433.name: Vanguard Spec
433.description:
Further enhances Gale Thrust.
Casting Gale Thrust grants a 20% fixed chance to cause Basic Attacks to evolve into Swift Blade, with an additional 5% chance per stack of Sharp.

Maximize Courage gain and expenditure to reduce the CD of Expertise skills. Haste increases Courage generation and the casting speed of core Expertise skills.

434.name: Battle Cry
434.description:
Typhoon Cleave raises the banner spear, granting Inspire to allies and increasing the caster's Crit DMG by 50% for 10s. Afterward, a follow-up leap can be launched, dealing Attack DMG to the enemies within range and knocking them airborne, while restoring 100 Courage.
Inspire: Lasts for 10s. All allies gain 10% Haste (only one effect can be active at a time). You restore 10 Courage per second and 1 Sharp every 2s.

438.name: Sharp
438.description: When <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> reaches <style="accent-gn">500</style> points, the additional ATK from <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext> increases to <style="accent-gn">6%</style>.

439.name: Break Pursuit Advancement
439.description: Within <style="accent-gn">15s</style> after Casting the <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style>, Casting <linktext=1522><style="ItemQuality_5">Breach Pursuit</style></linktext> will not start CD. This effect is removed after the duration ends or after Casting <style="accent-gn">3</style> times <linktext=1522><style="ItemQuality_5">Breach Pursuit</style></linktext>.

440.name: Wind Spiral
440.description:
When Gale Thrust deals DMG, it has a fixed 50% chance to grant 1 stack of Wind Spiral for 20s, stacking up to 10 times.
Wind Spiral: When casting Spiral Thrust or Valor Cyclone, it triggers a Spiral Explosion, dealing Attack DMG equal to Wind Spiral stacks x 200% ATK to nearby enemies. Each 1% of Mastery increases this DMG multiplier by 7%, up to 560%. This DMG cannot Crit, and decreases by 5% for each additional target hit, down to a minimum of 25%. Triggering this clears all Wind Spiral stacks.

441.name: Vigor Spike
441.description: When <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext> reaches full amount and the caster is in combat, enters <linktext=1155><style="ItemQuality_5">Vigor Spike</style></linktext> state, effective up to once every <style="accent-gn">30s</style> (affected by CD Boost stats).

442.name: Fearless Gale
442.description: After casting <linktext=1523><style="ItemQuality_5">Spiral Thrust</style></linktext> or <linktext=1522><style="ItemQuality_5">Breach Pursuit</style></linktext> or <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext>, the next <linktext=1517><style="ItemQuality_5">Gale Thrust</style></linktext> will not consume <style="accent-gn">Courage</style>. This effect is removed after leaving combat.

443.name: Whispering Breeze
443.description:
When Courage is below or equal to 50%, reduces the Energy Valor Cyclone consumes by 2.
When Courage is above 50%, increases the DMG Valor Cyclone deals by 12%.

444.name: Rapid Drake Cannon
444.description: Using <linktext=1592><style="ItemQuality_5">Swift Blade</style></linktext> grants it a fixed <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to evolve <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> into <linktext=1591><style="ItemQuality_5">Drake Cannon</style></linktext> in <style="accent-gn">10s</style>. Each failure to evolve increases the chance by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> until success.

445.name: Rupture
445.description: When <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext> deals DMG, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">50%</style> chance to inflict <linktext=1154><style="ItemQuality_5">Rupture</style></linktext>.

446.name: Spiral Tear
446.description: <linktext=1523><style="ItemQuality_5">Spiral Thrust</style></linktext> and <linktext=1590><style="ItemQuality_5">Vortex Strike</style></linktext> deals <style="accent-gn">30%</style> more DMG to the targets with <linktext=1153><style="ItemQuality_5">Rend</style></linktext>.

447.name: Fortitude
447.description:
During Valor Cyclone, gains Super Armor and reduces DMG taken by 20%.
When Valor Cyclone deals DMG, restores HP equal to 10% ATK.

448.name: Swift Breeze
448.description: Each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Haste accelerates the REG SPD of <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>.

449.name: Breath of Wind
449.description: Skills that consume <style="accent-gn">Courage</style> (<linktext=1523><style="ItemQuality_5">Spiral Thrust</style></linktext> and its enhanced skills, <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext>, <linktext=1524><style="ItemQuality_5">Falcon Toss</style></linktext> and its enhanced skills, <linktext=1517><style="ItemQuality_5">Gale Thrust</style></linktext>) gain <style="accent-gn">6%</style> Wind Bonus.

450.name: Wind Rise
450.description: When <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext> deals DMG, increases <linktext=1591><style="ItemQuality_5">Drake Cannon</style></linktext> and <linktext=1590><style="ItemQuality_5">Vortex Strike</style></linktext> Crit Chance by <style="accent-gn">7%</style>, and Crit DMG by <style="accent-gn">5%</style>. The effect lasts <style="accent-gn">5s</style> and stacks up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> times.

451.name: Strong Attack
451.description: When <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext> deals DMG, reduces the CD of Ultimate by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style> (which can only be triggers <style="accent-gn">once</style> on multiple hits).

452.name: Spiral Flame
452.description: Using <linktext=1590><style="ItemQuality_5">Vortex Strike</style></linktext>, increases Haste by <style="accent-gn">25%</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

453.name: Dragon's Fury Flame
453.description:
The Crit chance of ​Drake Cannon​ and ​Vortex Strike​ is doubled.
Increases the Crit DMG of Drake Cannon and Vortex Strike by 8%.
Each 1% Haste grants 0.5% Crit DMG for Drake Cannon​ and ​Vortex Strike​.

454.name: Wind Gate Drake Cannon
454.description: Every <style="accent-gn">22</style> triggers of <linktext=1518><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Cyclone</style></linktext> allows <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> to evolve into <linktext=1591><style="ItemQuality_5">Drake Cannon</style></linktext> in <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

455.name: Bird Advancement
455.description:
Increases the charge of Falcon Toss by 1.
Reduces Courage consumed by Falcon Toss by 50%.

456.name: Sharp Advancement
456.description:
Enhances the effectiveness of Wind Fury by 50%.
When Instant Edge consumes Chasing Step, doubles the charge efficiency of Sharp Impact.

457.name: Spear Recovery
457.description: <linktext=1156><style="ItemQuality_5">Spear Thrust</style></linktext> reduces the CD of <linktext=1524><style="ItemQuality_5">Falcon Toss</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">2s</style> (which can only be triggers once on multiple hits).

458.name: Sharp Long Breath
458.description: During <linktext=1187><style="ItemQuality_5">Wind Fury</style></linktext>, <linktext=1524><style="ItemQuality_5">Falcon Toss</style></linktext> evolves into <linktext=1589><style="ItemQuality_5">Azure Sever</style></linktext> <style="accent-gn">once</style>.

460.name: Skyfall
460.description: When dealing DMG, <linktext=1520><style="ItemQuality_5">Skyfall</style></linktext> gains a fixed <style="accent-gn">15%</style> chance to grant <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext>.

461.name: Pursuit Power
461.description: <linktext=1157><style="ItemQuality_5">Chasing Step</style></linktext> consumed increases <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> by <style="accent-gn">15%</style>. The effect lasts <style="accent-gn">10s</style> and stacks up to <style="accent-gn">2</style> times.

462.name: Exceptional Elegance
462.description: During <linktext=1553><style="ItemQuality_5">Galeform</style></linktext>, increases the DMG dealt by <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> and <linktext=1520><style="ItemQuality_5">Skyfall</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">25%</style>.

463.name: Typhoon: Sharp Impact
463.description: <linktext=1521><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp Impact</style></linktext> is enhanced, evolving into <linktext=1159><style="ItemQuality_5">Typhoon: Sharp Impact</style></linktext>.

464.name: Instant Edge Break Style
464.description:
Instant Edge consumes 1 more Sharp.
Increases the DMG dealt by Instant Edge by 90%.

465.name: Wind Swirl Strike
465.description:
Increases the DMG dealt by Tornado by 30%.
Increases the DMG dealt by Spear Thrust by 30%.

466.name: Sharp Pursuit
466.description: When <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> consumes <linktext=1157><style="ItemQuality_5">Chasing Step</style></linktext>, grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext>.

467.name: Instant Edge Combo
467.description: <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> has a fixed <style="accent-gn">25%</style> chance to trigger one extra instance of DMG (if Lucky Strike chance exceeds <style="accent-gn">25%</style>, that becomes the new trigger chance). This extra DMG equals <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> DMG x current Lucky Strike DMG multiplier%, and is affected by all relevant <linktext=1519><style="ItemQuality_5">Instant Edge</style></linktext> DMG bonuses.

468.name: Break Style
468.description: When dealing Crit DMG, <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> ignore the targets' <style="accent-gn">50%</style> Armor.

469.name: Sharp Echo
469.description: If <linktext=1152><style="ItemQuality_5">Sharp</style></linktext> isn't at Max stacks, increases the DMG dealt by <linktext=1520><style="ItemQuality_5">Skyfall</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">25%</style>.

470.name: Kamikaze Luck
470.description:
For each 1 stack of Sharp consumed, gains 3 points of Courage.
Increases Lucky Strike final DMG by 50%.

501.name: Intellect Conversion
501.description: Every <style="accent-gn">10</style> points of Intellect provides <style="accent-gn">1</style> point of MATK.

502.name: Inspiration
502.description: Applies <linktext=1107><style="ItemQuality_5">Inspiration</style></linktext> to yourself and allies within <style="accent-gn">30</style> meters.

503.name: Regen Bud
503.description:
Casting a Special Attack grants 1 Regen Bud.

Initial cap of Regen Buds: 4.
When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate generates healing, 2 Regen Buds are consumed to throw a Nourishing Seed, triggering up to once per second.
When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate deals DMG, 2 Regen Buds are consumed to shoot a Wild Seed, once per second.

505.name: Nature Shield
505.description:
When Wild Bloom heals a target, it also applies Nature Shield to them.
Targets with Nature Shield restore HP when hit, with the amount equal to 10% of your ATK. This effect can occur up to once per second.

506.name: Arcane of Green
506.description: When <linktext=1529><style="ItemQuality_5">Feral Seed</style></linktext> deals DMG, it increases <linktext=1530>ATK by <style="accent-gn">Mastery % x Luck %</style></linktext> for the next <style="accent-gn">10</style>s.

507.name: Healing Breath
507.description: When a <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style>, <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style>, or <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style> generates Healing, there is a <style="accent-gn">20%</style> to trigger <linktext=1109><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Chain</style></linktext>. For every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> Luck, the chance +<style="accent-gn">1%</style>.

508.name: Wild Blessing
508.description:
Wild Bloom now holds up to 2 charges.
Wild Bloom's Energy cost -15%.

509.name: Flourish
509.description: When <linktext=1530><style="ItemQuality_5">Infusion</style></linktext>, <linktext=1529><style="ItemQuality_5">Feral Seed</style></linktext>, or <linktext=1526><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Bloom</style></linktext> deals DMG, <style="accent-gn">30%</style> chance to reduce the CD of the <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style> by <style="accent-gn">1</style>s, once <style="accent-gn">per</style> second.

510.name: Smite Spec
510.description:
Further enhances the ability to use Wild Bloom.
Wild Bloom, Regen Pulse, and ​Nature Ward​ grant Symbiotic Mark to allies.
Symbiotic Mark: Lasts for 10s. All of the caster's DMG will heal allies with Symbiotic Mark for 45% of the DMG dealt.
Increases the final DMG of Lucky Strikes by 50%.
When overhealing a target with Symbiotic Mark, if the overheal reaches 30% of their Max HP, the excess healing is converted into a regeneration effect lasting for 10s. This effect can trigger only once every 30s.

Healing of Stillness: If the caster deals no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of the caster's Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies (party members prioritized), with the 4-hit combo restoring 12.6% Max HP in total. After using an Ultimate, Basic Attacks immediately start healing, but this effect is disabled upon dealing DMG to enemies.

Capable of converting attacks into healing. Lucky Strikes from attacks trigger various healing effects, enhancing healing while increasing DMG dealt.

511.name: Double Infusion
511.description: After casting <linktext=1593><style="ItemQuality_5">Stag Charge</style></linktext>, the number of channels for the next <linktext=1530><style="ItemQuality_5">Infusion</style></linktext> +<style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

512.name: Final Bloomwheel
512.description: When <linktext=1526><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Bloom</style></linktext> deals DMG, reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1530><style="ItemQuality_5">Infusion</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1s</style>. If the DMG triggers a Lucky Strike, the remaining CD is reduced by <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

514.name: Verdant Root
514.description:
While in battle state, standing still for 2s creates a Grass Domain.
Grass Domain: While inside the Grass Domain, your Haste +10%. Upon exiting the Grass Domain, your Movement SPD +50% for 0.5s, and Grass Domain disappears.

515.name: Full Bloom
515.description:
Casting Life Bloom grants a 40% chance to reduce the remaining CD of Blossom Charge and Nourish by 2s. Each 1% of Mastery increases this chance by 0.4%, up to a maximum of 60%.
Casting Life Bloom grants a 50% chance to reduce the remaining CD of Fast Growth by 0.2s, triggering at most once every 10s. Each 20% of Haste increases the CD reduction by 0.1s, up to a maximum of 0.5s.

516.name: Healing Infusion
516.description: Every <style="accent-gn">5</style> uses of <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> enhances the next direct healing <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> by <style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

518.name: Verdant Duet
518.description: <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> has a fixed <style="accent-gn">20%</style> chance to heal <style="accent-gn">1</style> additional time.

519.name: Floral Whisper
519.description: Healing <style="accent-gn">Expertise</style> generate <style="accent-gn">20%</style> more healing, but healing from <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> -<style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

520.name: Lifeforce Extension
520.description:
Increases the Healing of Healing Chain by 10%. For every 7% Mastery, Healing Chain jumps 1 additional time.
Healing Chain restores 1% of an ally's Max HP with each tick.

521.name: Nourish Essence
521.description: When <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> generates healing, <style="accent-gn">50%</style> chance to apply <linktext=1528><style="ItemQuality_5">Nourish</style></linktext>.

522.name: Endless Blossom
522.description: When casting <linktext=1533><style="ItemQuality_5">Blossom Charge</style></linktext>, <linktext=1534><style="ItemQuality_5">Grove Wish</style></linktext>, or <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext>, <style="accent-gn">20%</style> chance that the next cast of <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> within <style="accent-gn">5</style>s consumes no <style="accent-gn">Energy</style>.

523.name: Stag Charge
523.description:
After triggering a total of 10 Nourishing Seeds or Wild Seeds, Wild Bloom evolves into Stag Charge.
Casting Stag Charge instants grants 3 Regen Buds.

524.name: Wings of Revival
524.description:
When an ally within 20 meters takes DMG exceeding 30% of their HP, Revival triggers, which can affect the same target up to once every 45s.
Revival: Restores HP equal to 50% of the DMG taken over 5s.

525.name: Natural Bloom
525.description: When healing an ally with lower than <style="accent-gn">30%</style> HP, <style="accent-gn">Natural Bloom</style> triggers, instantly restoring HP equal to <style="accent-gn">200%</style> ATK to them. This effect can occur up to once every <style="accent-gn">30s</style>.

526.name: Healing Pulse
526.description: When an enemy within <style="accent-gn">10</style> meters that you are engaged with is defeated (effective within a team), generates a <linktext=1110><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Pulse</style></linktext>. This can only occur once every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

527.name: Gift of Life
527.description: When an enemy within <style="accent-gn">10</style> meters that you are engaged with is defeated (effective within a team), generates a <linktext=1113><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Orb</style></linktext>. This can only occur once every <style="accent-gn">2s</style>.

528.name: Bud Acquisition
528.description: When an enemy within <style="accent-gn">10</style> meters that you are engaged with is defeated (effective within a team), generates an <linktext=1114><style="ItemQuality_5">Engram Orb</style></linktext>, which grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Bud</style></linktext> upon pickup.

529.name: Defensive Blessing
529.description: <linktext=1107><style="ItemQuality_5">Inspiration</style></linktext> provides the target with an additional <style="accent-gn">400</style> Armor.

530.name: Flowers Ascension
530.description: When <linktext=1116><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Seed</style></linktext> deals DMG or <linktext=1115><style="ItemQuality_5">Nourishing Seed</style></linktext> generates healing, you gain a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Forest DMG bonus for the next <style="accent-gn">8</style>s.

531.name: Lifebind Spec
531.description:
Replace Special Attack with Life Bloom and enhances the skill.
Life Bloom generates 20% more healing.
Casting Life Bloom grants 1 additional Regen Bud.

Whenever safety allows, aim to cast as many healing skills as possible. Haste increases cast speed, and Mastery enhances healing potency.

532.name: Thorn
532.description:
When Wild Seed hits a target, it inflicts Thorn on them.
Forest DMG dealt by players to targets with Thorn +20%.

534.name: Verdant Blessing
534.description:
When HP of an ally with Inspiration drops below 20%, Blessing triggers.
Blessing: Grants a Nature Shield and reduces the DMG taken by 35% for 8s, once every 60s.

536.name: Dancing Seed
536.description:
When a DMG-type Expertise Skill triggers Lucky Strike, next Wild Seed launches 1 more projectile.
For every 5 Nourishing Seeds thrown, next Nourishing Seed throws 1 more projectile.

537.name: Energy Surge
537.description: Every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> haste provides <style="accent-gn">1%</style> <style="accent-gn">energy</style> natural recovery efficiency.

538.name: Regeneration Bud
538.description: When dealing damage with <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style>, <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to gain <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Bud</style></linktext>.

540.name: Shelter
540.description: Within <style="accent-gn">5s</style> after Casting <linktext=1530><style="ItemQuality_5">Infusion</style></linktext>, the damage absorption of the <linktext=1111><style="ItemQuality_5">Nature Shield</style></linktext> added by <linktext=1526><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Bloom</style></linktext> or <linktext=1535><style="ItemQuality_5">Nature Ward</style></linktext> is doubled.

541.name: Pulse Breath
541.description: If equipped with <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext> skill, <linktext=1535><style="ItemQuality_5">Nature Ward</style></linktext> and <style="accent-gn">Ultimates</style> will trigger <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext> when their CDs are completed.

542.name: Feral Seed Symbiosis
542.description: When active <style="accent-gn">Symbiotic Marks</style> reach <style="accent-gn">5</style> or more, <linktext=1529><style="ItemQuality_5">​Feral Seed​</style></linktext> and <linktext=1116><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Seed</style></linktext> DMG increases by <style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

543.name: Wild Protection
543.description:
The charge count of Nature Ward +1.
The charge time of Nature Ward decreases by 5s.

544.name: Wide-area Thorns
544.description:
Successful hit of Feral Seed on the targets with Thorn spreads Thorn to other units within 10 meters.
Attacking Elite or stronger targets grants 8% Forest Bonus.

545.name: Thornbreaker
545.description: <linktext=1530><style="ItemQuality_5">Infusion</style></linktext> and <linktext=1593><style="ItemQuality_5">Stag Charge</style></linktext> deal <style="accent-gn">100%</style> more Final DMG to <linktext=1117><style="ItemQuality_5">Thorned</style></linktext> targets (each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of Mastery grants an additional <style="accent-gn">4%</style>), but the healing conversion of <linktext=1530><style="ItemQuality_5">Infusion</style></linktext> and <linktext=1593><style="ItemQuality_5">Stag Charge</style></linktext> is halved.

546.name: Pulse Duality
546.description: When <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext> is actively used, it spreads <style="accent-gn">twice</style>.

547.name: Swift Shelter
547.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> use or trigger of <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext>, reduces the CD of <linktext=1535><style="ItemQuality_5">Nature Ward</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">2s</style>.

548.name: Pulse Retrospect
548.description:
Regen Pulse returns to your position after it reaches the max distance.
Regen Pulse now deals DMG to enemies.

549.name: Swift Bud
549.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Bud</style></linktext> gained, reduces the CD of <linktext=1529><style="ItemQuality_5">Feral Seed</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

550.name: Breath of Symbiosis
550.description:
Symbiotic Mark increases converted healing by 2%. Each 5% Mastery grants an additional 1%.
Symbiotic Mark also grants 2% Max HP for 5s (duration cannot be refreshed when reapplied).

551.name: Symbiosis Extension
551.description: Each <linktext=1116><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Seed</style></linktext> fired extends the duration of activated <style="accent-gn">Symbiotic Mark</style> by <style="accent-gn">1s</style>.

552.name: Pulse Echo
552.description:
When dealing DMG, Infusion grants 1 stack of Pulse Echo.
Pulse Echo: Increases DMG dealt of Regen Pulse by 20%, which lasts 12s and stacks up to 5 times.

553.name: Luck Damage
553.description:
Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier +5%.
Every 1% Luck grants 1.5% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier.

554.name: Verdant Impact
554.description: For every <style="accent-gn">20</style> stacks of <style="accent-gn">Pulse Echo</style> gained, the next actively cast <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext> triggers a <linktext=1533><style="ItemQuality_5">Blossom Charge</style></linktext> at both the nearest enemy and the Ally with lowest HP.

555.name: Wild Luck
555.description: When <linktext=1526><style="ItemQuality_5">Wild Bloom</style></linktext> or <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext> deal DMG, grants a chance (equal to the <style="accent-gn">half</style> percentage of Luck) to gain <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Bud</style></linktext>. If the target is affected by <linktext=1117><style="ItemQuality_5">Thorn</style></linktext>, doubles the chance.

556.name: Verdant Nourishment
556.description:
If you're affected with Nourish, reduces all DMG taken by 10%.
If the targets are affected by Nourish, enhances their Healing Received from yourself by 5%. If the stack of Nourish is above or equal to 3, additionally enhances Healing Received by 3%.

558.name: Life Bloom
558.description: Using <linktext=1533><style="ItemQuality_5">Blossom Charge</style></linktext> enhances the next <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext>, skipping the cast and increasing the Healing by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

559.name: Vitality
559.description:
Nourish can stack up to 5 times.
Each use of Life Bloom grants the targets with Nourish 1 stack of Nourish.

560.name: Flourishing Progress
560.description: When holding <style="accent-gn">2</style> or more <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Buds</style></linktext>, casting <linktext=1533><style="ItemQuality_5">Blossom Charge</style></linktext> for damage or healing always triggers a corresponding seed (without costing <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Buds</style></linktext>) and grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Bud</style></linktext>.

561.name: Blooming Reincarnation
561.description: Casting <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> increases <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext>'s healing by <style="accent-gn">20%</style> and its <style="accent-gn">Energy</style> consumed by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> for <style="accent-gn">4s</style>. This effect can stack up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

562.name: Energy Arcane
562.description:
During Fast Growth, increases Energy REG SPD by 50%.
Increases Grove Wish's Crit by 10%

565.name: Tricolor Revelation
565.description:
Consumes Moonlight Solace to launch Flower Dance - Tricolor Revelation.
Flower Dance - Tricolor Revelation: Grants all effects of Flower Stalks, once every 60s.

566.name: Flower Time Dance
566.description: Every <style="accent-gn">45s</style>, generates <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Flower Stalk</style> in the following order: <linktext=1119><style="ItemQuality_5">Crimson Insight</style></linktext>, <linktext=1120><style="ItemQuality_5">Golden Devotion</style></linktext>, and <linktext=1121><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonlight Solace</style></linktext>.

567.name: Bud to Blossom
567.description: When a <style="accent-gn">Flower Stalk</style> appears, grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1108><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Bud</style></linktext> every <style="accent-gn">2s</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

569.name: Energy Expansion
569.description:
Increases Max Energy by 20.
Using Blossom Charge restores 30% lost Energy.

570.name: Rescue
570.description: Healing <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> restore <style="accent-gn">25%</style> more HP to the targets with HP below <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

571.name: Instant Bloom
571.description: Every <style="accent-gn">5</style> uses of <linktext=1527><style="ItemQuality_5">Life Bloom</style></linktext> accelerates the using of <linktext=1534><style="ItemQuality_5">Grove Wish</style></linktext> or <linktext=1532><style="ItemQuality_5">Regen Pulse</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">100%</style> and increases their Healing by <style="accent-gn">50%</style> in <style="accent-gn">15s</style>.

900.name: Stone Fragment Tide
900.description: For <style="accent-gn">8</style>s after you cast <linktext=1536><style="ItemQuality_5">Cracking Echo</style></linktext>, each <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> pulls a target between <style="accent-gn">8</style> and <style="accent-gn">20</style> meters away toward you. The same target cannot be pulled again within <style="accent-gn">3</style>s.

903.name: Weakness Strike
903.description: When dealing DMG, <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> have a fixed <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to trigger <linktext=1123><style="ItemQuality_5">Weakness Strike</style></linktext> once.

906.name: Block Recovery
906.description:
Successful Block restores 1% of your HP and 2 Rage. This can only occur once per second.
Triggering Lucky Block restores 2% of your HP and 4 Rage. This can only occur once per second.

907.name: Countercrush
907.description:
A successful Block triggers a Countercrush, once per second.
On a Lucky Block, randomly triggers 1 to 3 Countercrush, once per second.

911.name: Rock Heal
911.description: <linktext=1597><style="ItemQuality_5">Stone Fist</style></linktext> restores <style="accent-gn">5%</style> max HP. For every <style="accent-gn">1</style> extra enemy hit, restores an additional <style="accent-gn">2%</style> max HP (up to a total of <style="accent-gn">15%</style>. Excess healing is converted into an equivalent Shield.

914.name: Slam Shelter
914.description: A successful hit with <linktext=1540><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Bash</style></linktext> reduces the target's DMG dealt to you by <style="accent-gn">3%</style> for <style="accent-gn">10</style>s, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

916.name: Resolute Breath
916.description: While shielded, use <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> midair to slam down, detonating the shield and dealing damage equal to <style="accent-gn">30%</style> max HP to nearby enemies.

917.name: Smash Support
917.description: Increases the effectiveness of Shield granted by <linktext=1540><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Bash</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">30%</style>.

919.name: Shield Combo
919.description: <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> have a fixed <style="accent-gn">5%</style> chance to trigger <linktext=1127><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Combo</style></linktext> upon dealing DMG. Each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Mastery grants an extra <style="accent-gn">0.2%</style> chance.

920.name: Breath of Stone
920.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> <style="accent-gn">Sand Crystal</style> consumed reduces the CD of <linktext=1542><style="ItemQuality_5">Stoneform</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style>s.

921.name: Elemental Harmony
921.description: While shielded, <style="magic">MATK Reduction</style> +<style="accent-gn">10%</style>. Each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of Mastery increases this effect by <style="accent-gn">0.5%</style>, up to a maximum of <style="accent-gn">40%</style>.

922.name: Shield Echo
922.description: During <linktext=1541><style="ItemQuality_5">Sandshroud</style></linktext>, adding a shield to yourself via <linktext=1540><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Bash</style></linktext> triggers <linktext=1128><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Echo</style></linktext>.

923.name: Shattering Rageblow
923.description:
When dealing DMG, Granite Fury has a 20% chance to allow your next Basic Attack to evolve into Rageblow. Each 2% Luck adds 1% chance.
After casting Rageblow, increases Block DMG Reduction by 10% for 10s.

925.name: Survival Instinct
925.description: When HP falls below <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, triggers <linktext=1129><style="ItemQuality_5">Survival Instinct</style></linktext>, once every <style="accent-gn">60</style>s.

926.name: Shadow Veil
926.description:
Each enemy within 3 meters increases your Block chance by 3%, up to 15%. (Doubles the effect against Elite or stronger enemies.) Remains unchanged when Earthfort Spec is active.
If Block Spec is activated, the effect becomes: Every enemy within 3 meters increases Block DMG Reduction by 1%, up to 5%. (Doubles the effect against Elite or stronger enemies.)

927.name: Valiant Fury
927.description: When <linktext=1135><style="ItemQuality_5">Enraged</style></linktext>, you gain <style="accent-gn">30%</style> bonus Armor, decreasing by <style="accent-gn">5%</style> per second.

928.name: Group Suppress
928.description: Each enemy within <style="accent-gn">3</style> meters enhances the effectiveness of <linktext=1122><style="ItemQuality_5">Suppress</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">3%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">15%</style>. This effect is doubled against Elite or stronger enemies.

929.name: Rage Awakening
929.description: Consuming <style="accent-gn">Rage</style> has a chance to enter <linktext=1135><style="ItemQuality_5">Enraged</style></linktext> state for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>. The more <style="accent-gn">Rage</style> you consume, the higher the chance. <style="accent-gn">Each</style> <style="accent-gn">Rage</style> increases the chance by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>.

930.name: Block Spec
930.description:
Replaces Special Attack with Countercrush, and enhances the ability.
When Lucky Block triggers, increases Block DMG Reduction by 10%.

Try to keep Countercrush active as much as possible. While it's active, part of incoming DMG can be blocked. High Luck allows parry to yield various buffs.

931.name: Earthfort Spec
931.description:
Further enhances the ability to use Shield Bash.
Each additional enemy hit increases the damage dealt by Shield Bash by 30%, up to 150%.
When attacked, increases All-Element Resistance by 0.6% for 4s, stacking up to 10 times. Each 1% Mastery increases this effect by 2%.

Maintain shield uptime whenever possible. Besides reducing incoming damage, the shield also applies certain effects when active.

932.name: Resonant Domain
932.description: <linktext=1536><style="ItemQuality_5">Cracking Echo</style></linktext> generates a <linktext=1137><style="ItemQuality_5">Sandfield</style></linktext> that lasts for <style="accent-gn">5</style>s.

933.name: Sandstone Rewind
933.description:
When Rageblow deals DMG, it reduces the CD of Brave Bastion by 3s.
Casting Brave Bastion immediately restores 50% Max HP. Any excess healing is converted into a shield that lasts 10s.

934.name: Sandstone Shock
934.description: During <linktext=1543><style="ItemQuality_5">Brave Bastion</style></linktext>, casting <linktext=1538><style="ItemQuality_5">Countercrush</style></linktext> or <linktext=1539><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite Fury</style></linktext> triggers <linktext=1136><style="ItemQuality_5">Sand Crystal Shock</style></linktext>.

935.name: Block Blessing
935.description: A successful <linktext=1170><style="ItemQuality_5">Block</style></linktext> grants a fixed <style="accent-gn">30%</style> chance for your next <linktext=1539><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite Fury</style></linktext> cast to consume no <style="accent-gn">Sand Crystals</style>. This effect can occur up to once every <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

938.name: Enrage Delay
938.description: When <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> reaches <style="accent-gn">500</style>, extends the duration of <linktext=1135><style="ItemQuality_5">Enraged</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

939.name: Sandstone Revival
939.description: For each <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Sand Crystal</style> consumed, restore <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of Max HP.

941.name: Rage Burst improvement
941.description:
The charge count of Rage Burst +1.
While Enraged, Rage Burst and Terra Sunder become instant cast.

942.name: Star Fury
942.description: Increases <linktext=1537><style="ItemQuality_5">Star Shatter</style></linktext> and <linktext=1594><style="ItemQuality_5">Starfall</style></linktext> DMG by <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, and guarantees <linktext=1135><style="ItemQuality_5">Enraged</style></linktext> status.

943.name: Stone Domain
943.description:
