Throughout the duration of Sandshroud, being attacked reduces the attack speed of enemy targets within a 5 meter radius by 30% for 3s.
throughout the duration of Sandshroud, Armor of allies within an 8 meter radius +10%.

944.name: Amplified Earthfort
944.description: Upon the triggering of <linktext=1123><style="ItemQuality_5">Weakness Strike</style></linktext>, gains <linktext=1124><style="ItemQuality_5">Amplified Earthfort</style></linktext>.

945.name: Boulder Shield
945.description: During <linktext=1542><style="ItemQuality_5">Stoneform</style></linktext>, reduces all DMG taken by <style="accent-gn">10%</style>.

946.name: Shield Bash
946.description:
Enhances Shield effectiveness by 10%.
During Sandshroud, additionally enhances Shield effectiveness by 10%.

947.name: Recovery
947.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> successful hit of <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> or <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> increases <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> in <style="accent-gn">5s</style>. The effect stacks up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times. With <style="accent-gn">10</style> stacks, increases <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> for <style="accent-gn">8s</style>. During this effect, the next <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> heals you for <style="accent-gn">20%</style> of the DMG dealt, yet no additional <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> stacks can be gained.

948.name: Starfall
948.description: For every <style="accent-gn">20</style> <style="accent-gn">Sand Crystals</style> consumed, <linktext=1537><style="ItemQuality_5">Star Shatter</style></linktext> evolves into <linktext=1594><style="ItemQuality_5">Starfall</style></linktext>.

949.name: Rock Master
949.description:
Casting Starfall grants Rock Master.
Rock Master: For 15s, Basic Attack evolves into 1 Rupture, and Rage Burst evolves into 1 Terra Sunder.
When Rock Master activates, grants 10% Rock Bonus for 10s.

950.name: Shatter Strike
950.description: When <linktext=1537><style="ItemQuality_5">Star Shatter</style></linktext> or <linktext=1594><style="ItemQuality_5">Starfall</style></linktext> defeats a target, <linktext=1537><style="ItemQuality_5">Star Shatter </style></linktext>immediately recovers <style="accent-gn">1</style> charge.

951.name: Enraged Rupture
951.description: While <linktext=1135><style="ItemQuality_5">Enraged</style></linktext>, <linktext=1595><style="ItemQuality_5">Rupture</style></linktext> is bound to trigger <linktext=1123><style="ItemQuality_5">Weakness Strike</style></linktext>.

952.name: Bash Pursuit
952.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> times damage is taken, the next <linktext=1540><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Bash</style></linktext> deals additional fixed damage equal to <style="accent-gn">100%</style> HP + <style="accent-gn">300%</style> of current shield amount (shield amount cannot exceed <style="accent-gn">150%</style> Max HP). Can trigger at most once every <style="accent-gn">20</style>s. Every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> of Mastery reduces the required times of damage taken by <style="accent-gn">1</style>. Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of Versatility reduces the trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>).

953.name: Great Rock Master
953.description: Casting <linktext=1542><style="ItemQuality_5">Stoneform​</style></linktext> grants <style="accent-gn">Rock Master</style>: For <style="accent-gn">15s</style>, <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> evolves into <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1595><style="ItemQuality_5">Rupture</style></linktext>, and <linktext=1544><style="ItemQuality_5">Rage Burst</style></linktext> evolves into <style="accent-gn">1</style><linktext=1134> <style="ItemQuality_5">Terra Sunder</style></linktext>.

954.name: Bravery in Battle
954.description: While in combat, overhealing is converted into a shield (total shield cannot exceed <style="accent-gn">50%</style> of Max HP).

955.name: Rock Guard
955.description:
Armor +5%.
Each attack of Terra Sunder deals an additional instance of Attack DMG to the target, equal to 100% Armor.

956.name: Rampart Fury
956.description: When you take DMG, <linktext=1126><style="ItemQuality_5">Lucky Block</style></linktext> reduces DMG taken by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>, lasting for <style="accent-gn">8</style>s, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

957.name: Block Shelter
957.description: <linktext=1539><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite Fury</style></linktext> DMG enhances <linktext=1126><style="ItemQuality_5">Lucky Block</style></linktext> DMG Reduction by <style="accent-gn">2%</style> for <style="accent-gn">8s</style>. Stacks up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times.

958.name: Sand Block
958.description: Successfully <linktext=1170><style="ItemQuality_5">Blocking</style></linktext> has a fixed <style="accent-gn">20%</style> chance to gain <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Sand Crystal</style>. If it was a <linktext=1126><style="ItemQuality_5">Lucky Block</style></linktext>, gain an additional <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Sand Crystal</style>.<linktext=1170><style="ItemQuality_5"></style></linktext>

959.name: Rock Heart
959.description:
Every 10 casts of ​Granite Fury​ grant Rock Heart.
Rock Heart: For 10s, ​Granite Fury​ evolves into Stone Fist.
When Rock Heart activates, grants 10% Rock Bonus for 10s.
Casting Stone Fist guarantees Enraged.

960.name: Granite
960.description: After casting <linktext=1597><style="ItemQuality_5">Stone Fist</style></linktext>, for the next <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, summons <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1131><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite</style></linktext> every <style="accent-gn">2s</style>.

962.name: Granite Fury Pursuit
962.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> times damage is taken, the next <linktext=1539><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite Fury</style></linktext> deals additional fixed damage equal to <style="accent-gn">7,000%</style> of Armor. Can trigger at most once every <style="accent-gn">20</style>s. Every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> Mastery reduces the required times of damage taken by <style="accent-gn">1</style>. Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Luck reduces the trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>).

963.name: Rampart Fortitude
963.description: While <linktext=1543><style="ItemQuality_5">Brave Bastion</style></linktext> is active, taking DMG doubles <linktext=1125><style="ItemQuality_5">Countercrush</style></linktext> DMG.

965.name: Granite Combo
965.description: When <linktext=1131><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite</style></linktext> deals DMG, there is a chance, of which equals Luck Chance, to summon <style="accent-gn">an additional</style> <linktext=1131><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite</style></linktext>.

966.name: Intimidation
966.description: When <linktext=1131><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite</style></linktext> hits a target, it reduces all DMG taken by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> for the next <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

967.name: Granite Fury
967.description: Summoning <style="accent-gn">20</style> <linktext=1131><style="ItemQuality_5">Granites</style></linktext> grants <style="accent-gn">Rock Heart</style>: For <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, <linktext=1539><style="ItemQuality_5">Granite Fury</style></linktext> evolves into <linktext=1597><style="ItemQuality_5">Stone Fist</style></linktext>.

968.name: Counter Storm
968.description: For <style="accent-gn">10s</style> after casting <linktext=1536><style="ItemQuality_5">Cracking Echo</style></linktext>, trigger <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1125><style="ItemQuality_5">Countercrush</style></linktext> every <style="accent-gn">2s</style>.

1100.name: Photon Limit
1100.description:
Increases Max Photon Energy by 20, extending the duration of Photon Reforge. Unaffected when Wildpack Spec is active.
If Falconry Spec is activated, the effect becomes: Max Photon Energy -20 but Photon Reforge state can be entered more quickly.

1102.name: Vulnerable Strike
1102.description:
Dealing DMG grants a fixed 30% chance to apply Vulnerability to the enemy.
Vulnerability: Increases the DMG you deal to the target by 10% for 5s.

1103.name: Wolf Pact
1103.description:
Tames a Wild Wolf to fight alongside you. Storm Arrow has a 30% fixed chance to trigger Coordinated Attack.

Wild Wolf
A Wild Wolf fights alongside you.
Basic Attack: Sweeps the enemy, dealing Attack DMG equal to 60% ATK (which scales with the Level/Tier of your Basic Attack).
Coordinated Attack: Wild Wolf leaps to the enemy and bites, dealing Attack DMG equal to 100% ATK (which scales with the Level/Tier of your Basic Attack).

1104.name: Psychic Surge
1104.description: For every <style="accent-gn">15</style> <style="accent-gn">Special Attacks</style> cast, <style="accent-gn">Photon Energy</style> granted by the next cast of <linktext=1550><style="ItemQuality_5">Arrow Rain</style></linktext> +<style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

1105.name: Battle Howl
1105.description: While <linktext=1549><style="ItemQuality_5">Wildcall</style></linktext> is active, the <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style> is bound to deal Crit DMG on hit.

1106.name: Direwolf's Hunger
1106.description:
When the Wild Wolf deals Crit DMG, you and your Beast gain 2% Haste for 10s. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
When Haste exceeds 35%, every extra 1% of Haste grants 0.2% ATK.

1107.name: Meditation
1107.description:
While in Photon Reforge, Photon Energy drain per second is reduced from 25 to 20, allowing the effect to last longer. Unaffected when Wildpack Spec is active.
If Falconry Spec is activated, the effect becomes: Photon Energy regeneration is increased from 2 to 3 points per second, reducing the time required to enter Photon Reforge.

1108.name: Phantom Wolfstrike
1108.description:
When Wild Wolf launches a Coordinated Attack, or Tail Sweep, there is a fixed 30% chance to summon a Phantom Direwolf using Pounce and Bite to attack the current enemy.
Pounce and Bite inflicts Bleed, and if the target is already suffered from Bleed, Pounce and Bite deals Crit DMG.

1109.name: Direwolf Bite
1109.description: <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style>'s <style="accent-gn">Coordinated Attack</style> has a <style="accent-gn">50%</style> fixed chance to inflict <linktext=1141><style="ItemQuality_5">Bleed</style></linktext>.

1110.name: Demon Wolf Twin
1110.description: When <linktext=1601><style="ItemQuality_5">Storm Arrow</style></linktext> deals DMG in battle, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to summon a <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style> for <style="accent-gn">8</style>s. This effect can occur once every <style="accent-gn">40s</style>.

1111.name: Photon Reforge Lore
1111.description: While <linktext=1138><style="ItemQuality_5">Photon Reforge</style></linktext> is active, all of the <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style>'s attacks nullify the target's Armor.

1112.name: Twin Arrows
1112.description: <linktext=1546><style="ItemQuality_5">Luminary Bolt</style></linktext> additionally causes a <style="accent-gn">Photon</style> Explosion, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">1,500%</style> ATK (which scales with the Level/Tier of Ultimate), and also knocks targets airborne and increases the DMG you deal to them by <style="accent-gn">5%</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

1114.name: Tracer Arrows
1114.description: While <linktext=1138><style="ItemQuality_5">Photon Reforge</style></linktext> is active, for <style="accent-gn">each</style> beast on the battlefield, <linktext=1601><style="ItemQuality_5">Storm Arrow</style></linktext> fires <style="accent-gn">1</style> extra <linktext=1142><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightseeker Arrow</style></linktext> (up to <style="accent-gn">4</style> arrows).

1116.name: Swift
1116.description:
Applies Swift to the Falcon when casting Lightning Strike.
Swiftness: Increases Attack SPD by 10%. This effect lasts 8s and stacks up to 3 times.

1118.name: Falcon Raid
1118.description: For every <style="accent-gn">3</style> instances of Crit DMG dealt by <style="accent-gn">Special Attacks</style>, the <style="accent-gn">Falcon</style> instantly launches <linktext=1143><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightning Strike</style></linktext>.

1119.name: Meteor
1119.description:
When the Falcon strikes, grants you a fixed 30% chance to gain 1 stack of Weak Point Aim.
Using Quadraflare leaves behind a Radiance Rift midair. Radiance Rift fires Photon Arrows equal to the current number of Weak Point Aim stacks.

1120.name: Piercing Shot
1120.description: Increases the Crit of <linktext=1547><style="ItemQuality_5">Double Arrow</style></linktext> and <linktext=1557><style="ItemQuality_5">Quadraflare</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">7%</style>.

1121.name: Falcon's Heart
1121.description: The <style="accent-gn">Falcon</style> ignores <style="accent-gn">30%</style> of the target's Armor.

1122.name: Lightfall
1122.description:
Each 1% critical rate increases Crit DMG by 0.5%.
When Double Arrow or Quadraflare deals Crit DMG, 2 Photon Energy is restored.

1123.name: Focused Shot
1123.description: <style="accent-gn">Every</style> target hit grants <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Light DMG bonus. The bonus lasts <style="accent-gn">3</style>s and can layerup to <style="accent-gn">4</style> times.

1124.name: Valiant Heart
1124.description: Companions deal <style="accent-gn">15%</style> more DMG to Elites or stronger enemies.

1125.name: Overcharge
1125.description: When <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> deal DMG, there is a <style="accent-gn">5%</style> fixed chance to instantly grant <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> 1 charge, up to the maximum charge limit.

1126.name: Wildpack Spec
1126.description:
Further enhances Storm Arrow and the Wild Wolf's power.
Storm Arrow always deals 200% Crit DMG on critical hits.
While Photon Reforge is active, the chance for the Wild Wolf to trigger Coordinated Attack is increased to 100%.

The Wild Wolf becomes empowered, and Haste allows both you and the wolf to attack more frequently.

1127.name: Arrow Barrage
1127.description: <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> have a fixed <style="accent-gn">20%</style> chance to fire one arrow at each of up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> enemies near the target.

1128.name: Sundering Arrow
1128.description: <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> have a fixed <style="accent-gn">15%</style> chance to trigger <linktext=1151><style="ItemQuality_5">Split Arrow</style></linktext>, once <style="accent-gn">per</style> second.

1129.name: Falconry Spec
1129.description:
Replaces Special Attack with Double Arrow and enhances the ability to use this skill.
Regenerates 2 Photon Energy per second.
Each 1% Haste grants 1% CD decrease to Double Arrow.
You can tame a Falcon to assist you in battle.

Falcon always follows the caster. When the caster deals DMG with Class Skills, the Falcon has a fixed 23% chance to swiftly strike the target (guaranteed on Crit), dealing Attack DMG equal to 150% ATK to the enemy (which scales with the Level/Tier of Basic Attack). Additionally, when the strike count of the Falcon exceeds 5, the next strike of the Falcon combines all excess strikes and DMG.

The Falcon responds to the caster's attacks. Haste and Crit increase its strike frequency, and after learning Lightning Strike, the Falcon deals significantly more DMG.

1130.name: Wolf Dancer
1130.description:
After you use Arrow Rain, the Wild Wolf continuously performs Tail Sweep until the Arrow Rain ends.
Wild Wolf's Tail Sweep is bound to deal Crit DMG and to inflict Bleed.

1131.name: Explosive Arrow
1131.description: When a <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> or <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> deals DMG, it has a fixed <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to fire an <linktext=1144><style="ItemQuality_5">Explosive Arrow</style></linktext>, once every <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

1132.name: Rapid Shot
1132.description: Every <style="accent-gn">5%</style> Haste provides an additional <style="accent-gn">1%</style> attack speed.

1136.name: Wolf Sharp Strike
1136.description: In the state of <linktext=1138><style="ItemQuality_5">Photon Reforge</style></linktext>, <style="accent-gn">Wolf</style> Crit DMG +<style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

1137.name: Beast Tidal Power
1137.description:
Increases Light Bonus by 3%.
For 5s after casting Torrent Volley or its enhanced form Lumi Torrent, increases Light Bonus by 10%.

1138.name: Arrow Rain Acceleration
1138.description: Each time you summon <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Wolf</style> or <style="accent-gn">Phantom Wolf</style>, the remaining CD of <linktext=1550><style="ItemQuality_5">Arrow Rain</style></linktext> -<style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>.

1139.name: Life Hunt
1139.description: For each additional <linktext=1141><style="ItemQuality_5">Bleed</style></linktext> effect on the target, <style="accent-gn">Wolf</style> deals +<style="accent-gn">3%</style> damage to it.

1140.name: Wolf Fang Pact
1140.description: <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style>'s <style="accent-gn">Coordinated Attack</style> or <style="accent-gn">Tail Sweep</style> deals damage (triggers only once even when hitting multiple targets) and reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1601><style="ItemQuality_5">Storm Arrow</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style>s.

1141.name: Light and Shadow Drain
1141.description: <linktext=1142><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightseeker Arrow</style></linktext> has a fixed <style="accent-gn">50%</style> chance to apply <linktext=1141><style="ItemQuality_5">Bleed</style></linktext> to the target.

1142.name: Wolf Evolution
1142.description: <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style> evolves into its <style="accent-gn">Adult Form</style>, increases DMG by <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, DMG Range by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

1143.name: Legendary Beast
1143.description:
Casting Wildcall summons a Legendary Companion based on current Photon Energy: If Photon Energy is below 50%, summons Legendary Eagle. If Photon Energy reaches 50% or more, summons Legendary Boar.
Wildcall now holds up to 2 charges.

1144.name: Lumi Torrent
1144.description:
While in Photon Reforge state, Torrent Volley continuously charges. After 30s of charging, Torrent Volley evolves into Lumi Torrent.
Upon casting Lumi Torrent, immediately gain full Photon Energy.

1145.name: Wild Call CD
1145.description: For <style="accent-gn">each</style> <linktext=1142><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightseeker Arrow</style></linktext> fired, reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1549><style="ItemQuality_5">Wildcall</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">0.4</style>s (when Haste exceeds <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, each extra <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Haste reduces an additional <style="accent-gn">0.005</style>s, up to <style="accent-gn">0.8</style>s).

1147.name: Light Chasing Sharp
1147.description: While <linktext=1138><style="ItemQuality_5">Photon Reforge</style></linktext> is active, reduces <linktext=1601><style="ItemQuality_5">Storm Arrow</style></linktext> CD by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

1148.name: Arrow of Light
1148.description: <linktext=1550><style="ItemQuality_5">Arrow Rain</style></linktext> and <linktext=1142><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightseeker Arrow</style></linktext> are bound to deal Crit DMG.

1150.name: Wolf's Bite
1150.description: <style="accent-gn">Wild Wolf</style> deals additionally <style="accent-gn">30%</style> DMG to targets with current HP less than or equal to <style="accent-gn">35%</style>.

1151.name: Stomp
1151.description: Casting <linktext=1549><style="ItemQuality_5">Wildcall</style></linktext> again within <style="accent-gn">10s</style> of its initial cast commands all beasts on the field to immediately cast <linktext=1145><style="ItemQuality_5">Stomp</style></linktext>.

1152.name: Steel Beak
1152.description:
When the caster and the Falcon deal Crit DMG, inflicts 1 stack of Steel Beak to the target.
Every 10 stacks of Steel Beak trigger Lightning Strike, up to once every 3s.

1153.name: Phantom Falcon
1153.description: Triggering <style="accent-gn">Implosion</style> <style="accent-gn">5</style> times summons a <linktext=1150><style="ItemQuality_5">Phantom Falcon</style></linktext> to charge at the target. For each additional target hit by the <linktext=1150><style="ItemQuality_5">Phantom Falcon</style></linktext>, its DMG increases by <style="accent-gn">20%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">200%</style>.

1154.name: Focused Concentration
1154.description: Throughout the duration of <linktext=1555><style="ItemQuality_5">Focus</style></linktext>, gains <style="accent-gn">0.5%</style> Crit and <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Crit DMG every <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> times.

1155.name: Dual Arrow Mastery
1155.description: When a <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> deals Crit DMG, reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1548><style="ItemQuality_5">Blast Shot</style></linktext> and <linktext=1582><style="ItemQuality_5">Powerdraw</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

1156.name: Sharp Double Arrow I
1156.description: Increases the Crit DMG of <linktext=1547><style="ItemQuality_5">Double Arrow</style></linktext> and <linktext=1557><style="ItemQuality_5">Quadraflare</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">15%</style>.

1157.name: Light Energy Stasis
1157.description:
When Radiance Barrage hits a target, it applies Light Energy Stasis to them.
Light Energy Stasis: movement speed -30%. Being hit by Powerdraw is bound to deal Crit DMG. Lasts for 5s.

1158.name: Falcon Break
1158.description: The <style="accent-gn">Falcon</style> ignores <style="accent-gn">20%</style> of the target's Armor, and <style="accent-gn">40%</style> when dealing Crit DMG.

1159.name: Eagle Eye
1159.description: When <style="accent-gn">Photon Energy</style> is above <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, casting <linktext=1581><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiance Barrage</style></linktext> counts as <linktext=1138><style="ItemQuality_5">Photon Reforge</style></linktext>.

1160.name: Celestial Eagle
1160.description:
While Focus is active, Radiance Barrage summons 1 Celestial Eagle at the target's location.
Now, each 1% of Haste increases the CD Boost of Focus by 1%.

1161.name: Radiant Charge
1161.description: When an arrow fired from <style="accent-gn">Radiance Rift</style> deals DMG for <style="accent-gn">1</style> time, increases the DMG of the next <linktext=1548><style="ItemQuality_5">Blast Shot</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">20%</style>, up to a maximum of <style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

1162.name: Light Prism
1162.description:
When Lightning Strike hits a target, it triggers Light Prism.
Light Prism: Deals area damage equal to 100% ATK to up to 5 surrounding enemy targets, and additionally applies 3 stacks of Steel Beak.

1164.name: Energy Gathering Power
1164.description:
Powerdraw CD -50%.
When Photon Energy is above 50%, casting Powerdraw counts as Photon Reforge.

1165.name: Steel Beak Strike
1165.description: When <linktext=1582><style="ItemQuality_5">Powerdraw</style></linktext> hits a target, it applies <style="accent-gn">2</style> stacks of <linktext=1148><style="ItemQuality_5">Steel Beak</style></linktext>. If it deals Crit DMG, it applies <style="accent-gn">5</style> stacks of <linktext=1148><style="ItemQuality_5">Steel Beak</style></linktext>.

1166.name: Steel Beak Gathering
1166.description: When <linktext=1149><style="ItemQuality_5">Celestial Eagle</style></linktext> hits a target, it prevents the target's <linktext=1148><style="ItemQuality_5">Steel Beak</style></linktext> from naturally decaying.

1167.name: Chain Explosion
1167.description: <linktext=1548><style="ItemQuality_5">Blast Shot</style></linktext> Upon detonation, inflicts <style="accent-gn">10</style> stacks of <linktext=1148><style="ItemQuality_5">Steel Beak</style></linktext> on all targets hit.

1200.name: Lightforged Body
1200.description: Every <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> consumed grants a <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext> equal to <style="accent-gn">45%</style> ATK (depending on Adventurer Level, up to <style="accent-gn">90%</style>).

1201.name: Condemn
1201.description: When casting a skill that consumes <style="accent-gn">Photon Energy</style>, there is a <style="accent-gn">30%</style> fixed chance for <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> to evolve into <linktext=1598><style="ItemQuality_5">Condemn</style></linktext>.

1202.name: Blessing of Holy Sigil
1202.description: When using a Skill that consumes <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigils</style>, <style="accent-gn">20%</style> chance for your next <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style>-consuming skill to consume no <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigils</style>. The effect lasts for <style="accent-gn">8</style>s or until a <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style>-consuming skill is cast.

1203.name: Ring of Judgment
1203.description:
Casting Judgment generates a Divine Circle, with a CD of 30s.
Each Holy Sigil consumed reduces the remaining CD by 1s.

1204.name: Lightforge Continuum
1204.description: For every <style="accent-gn">20</style> <style="accent-gn">Photon Energy</style> consumed, gains <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext> equal to <style="accent-gn">45%</style> ATK (this ratio is affected by Adventurer Level, up to <style="accent-gn">90%</style>).

1205.name: Haste Sigil
1205.description: Each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Haste increases the recovery speed of <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>. Recovery time = Initial recovery time / (<style="accent-gn">1</style> + recovery speed bonus).

1207.name: Light of Condemn
1207.description: While inside a <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext>, your <linktext=1598><style="ItemQuality_5">Condemn</style></linktext> is enhanced, thrusting a blade of light forward and dealing double DMG.

1208.name: Recovery Spec
1208.description:
Further enhances your ability to use Valor Bash.
Valor Bash is accompanied by Radiant Impact.

Try to maintain the Armor bonus from Valor Bash, and trigger Inferno Reckon through high Crits to gain more Photon Energy. Sufficient Photon Energy means continuous self-healing under the blessing of Judgment and Scorching Judgment.

1209.name: Oracle
1209.description:
When a skill that consumes Holy Sigil critically hits, gain an additional 30% Photon Energy.
Crit DMG of skills that consume Photon Energy +30%.

1210.name: Judgment Revelation
1210.description: When <linktext=1177><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Strike</style></linktext> Crits, there's a <style="accent-gn">50%</style> fixed chance to automatically cast <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> on the target (this <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> cannot trigger <linktext=1177><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Strike</style></linktext>).

1211.name: Divine Circle Defender
1211.description: While within the <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext>, the Armor effect provided by <linktext=1561><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Bash</style></linktext> +<style="accent-gn">30%</style>.

1212.name: Radiant Guard
1212.description:
Casting Shield Toss immediately grants a Radiant Shield equal to 55% Armor (affected by Versatility and Element bonuses).
The charge count of Shield Toss +1.

1213.name: Aegis Ward's Anthem
1213.description: For every <style="accent-gn">2</style> <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigils</style> consumed, the remaining CD of <linktext=1565><style="ItemQuality_5">Aegis Ward</style></linktext> -<style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

1214.name: Fearless Shield
1214.description: Each time <linktext=1562><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Toss</style></linktext> deals DMG, gain a <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext> equal to <style="accent-gn">13.75%</style> Armor (affected by Versatility and Element bonuses).

1215.name: Aegis Ward's Retribution
1215.description:
During Aegis Ward, Block chance is increased to 1.5 times.
When attacked, reduces Aegis Ward's remaining CD by 0.5s. This effect can only trigger once per second.

1216.name: Lightforged Greatsword
1216.description:
After every 10 casts of Judgment, the next Judgment is enhanced into Scorching Judgment.
Scorching Judgment: Summon a holy greatsword to descend upon the target area for 5s, healing yourself (Healing equal to that of Judgment) while dealing damage over time to nearby enemies and inflicting Scorch, totally dealing Attack DMG equal to 600% ATK (scales with Judgment level/rank).
Scorch: Reduces damage taken from the target by 3% for 10s. Stacks up to 10 times. Grants 3 stacks of Scorch on Crit.

1217.name: Holy Barrier
1217.description: Using <style="accent-gn">Ultimate Skill</style> creates a <style="accent-gn">Holy Barrier</style>, shielding nearby allies from DMG. The <style="accent-gn">Holy Barrier</style> lasts for <style="accent-gn">15s</style> or until it absorbs Total DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">150%</style> Max HP +<style="accent-gn">3000%</style> Armor.

1218.name: Shield Spec
1218.description:
Replaces Special Attack with Vanguard Strike and enhances its power.
Each additional enemy hit by Vanguard Strike grants 2 extra Photon Energy, up to 10.
Successfully Block prevents losing the stacks of Lightforged Barrier.

Lightforged Barrier: Each stack increases Max HP by 2%, up to 10 stacks, with each instance of DMG removing 1 stack. It lasts 25s or until all stacks are consumed. gaining stacks resets the duration.

Managing Lightforged Barrier is crucial for sustaining high HP and triggering self-healing and DMG Reduction effects from Judgment, Zeal Crusade, and Radiance.

1220.name: Ascension of the Lightforged Barrier
1220.description:
Photon Energy cap +20.
When you have at least 5 stacks of Lightforged Barrier, Judgment consumes 5 less Photon Energy.

1221.name: Divine Circle Chant
1221.description: The recovery rate of <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigils</style> from Haste +<style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

1222.name: Holy Strike
1222.description: Each time <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext> is consumed or deducted, <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to obtain <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style>.

1223.name: Holy Radiance
1223.description:
When Sacred Blade hits an enemy target, it applies a Holy Mark to the target.
Vanguard Strike can spread this Holy Mark to hit enemy targets.

1224.name: Determination Slash
1224.description: When <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext> has <style="accent-gn">5</style> or fewer stacks, taking DMG no longer reduces its stacks. When <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext> has more than <style="accent-gn">5</style> stacks, taking DMG has a <style="accent-gn">50%</style> fixed chance not to reduce its stacks.

1225.name: Lightforged Drive
1225.description: When casting <linktext=1568><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiance</style></linktext>, it automatically releases <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> to up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> nearby enemy targets.

1226.name: Ruthless Rewind
1226.description: During <linktext=1567><style="ItemQuality_5">Zeal Crusade</style></linktext>, <style="accent-gn">each</style> <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> consumed grants <linktext=1567><style="ItemQuality_5">Zeal Crusade</style></linktext> <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of charge. When the charge reaches <style="accent-gn">3</style> stacks, <linktext=1567><style="ItemQuality_5">Zeal Crusade</style></linktext> bursts outward, dealing DMG equal to <style="accent-gn">6%</style> max HP.

1227.name: Divine Circle Resonance
1227.description: For <style="accent-gn">each</style> enemy inside <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext>, increases <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext> DMG by <style="accent-gn">25%</style> and <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext> Healing by <style="accent-gn">5%</style> (caps at <style="accent-gn">10</style> enemies).

1228.name: Judgment Pursuit
1228.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> times damage is taken, the next <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> deals additional fixed damage equal to <style="accent-gn">200%</style> Max HP. Can trigger at most once every <style="accent-gn">20</style>s. Every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> of Mastery reduces the required times of damage taken by <style="accent-gn">1</style>. Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> of Haste reduces the trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>).

1229.name: Divine Circle Blessing
1229.description: While within the <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext>, your Healing Received +<style="accent-gn">10%</style>.

1230.name: Lightforged Balance
1230.description:
When your HP percentage is higher than your target's, DMG taken from that target -5%.
When your HP percentage is lower than your target's, Judgment deals 50% more DMG.

1231.name: Lightforged Fortitude
1231.description: Throughout the duration of <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext>, <linktext=1170><style="ItemQuality_5">Block</style></linktext> chance +<style="accent-gn">10%</style>.

1232.name: Energy Guard
1232.description: After casting an <style="accent-gn">Ultimate</style>, all allies' Max HP is increased by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style> (this effect does not stack).

1234.name: Condemn Time Limit
1234.description: When <linktext=1598><style="ItemQuality_5">Condemn</style></linktext> deals damage, it immediately cools down <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> (prioritizing the <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> with the longest remaining CD).

1235.name: Sword Dance
1235.description: When a <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> critically heals, gain a <style="accent-gn">15%</style> healing bonus.

1236.name: Shield Impact
1236.description: Hold <linktext=1561><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Bash</style></linktext> to charge, then dash forward a short distance.

1237.name: Reckon Shield
1237.description: Each time <linktext=1600><style="ItemQuality_5">Inferno Reckon</style></linktext> or <linktext=1563><style="ItemQuality_5">Reckoning</style></linktext> deals Crit DMG to <style="accent-gn">1</style> enemy target, <linktext=1170><style="ItemQuality_5">Block</style></linktext> chance +<style="accent-gn">5%</style>, lasting for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

1238.name: Holy Light Time Limit
1238.description: During <linktext=1565><style="ItemQuality_5">Aegis Ward</style></linktext>, when an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> deals Crit DMG, there's a <style="accent-gn">50%</style> fixed chance to instantly reset <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> CD (prioritizing <style="accent-gn">Holy Sigil</style> with the longest remaining CD). This effect triggers only once when multiple targets are hit.

1239.name: Holy Summon
1239.description: When <linktext=1562><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Toss</style></linktext> or <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> deals DMG, <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to trigger <linktext=1177><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Strike</style></linktext>. If Crit DMG is dealt, the chance increases to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

1240.name: Light Chain
1240.description:
While Aegis Ward is active, the chance of Divine Strike is doubled.
Every 3 times Divine Strike is triggered, the duration of Aegis Ward is extended by 1 second.

1241.name: Reckon Blaze
1241.description:
When Valor Bash deals Crit DMG, gain Blazing.
Casting Aegis Ward guarantees Blazing.
Scorching Heat: For the next 10s, Reckoning evolves into Inferno Reckon.

1242.name: Holy Heal
1242.description: While having <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext>, gains <style="accent-gn">12%</style> healing bonus.

1243.name: Light Protection
1243.description: While having <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext>, gain <style="accent-gn">5%</style> Light bonus.

1244.name: Ultimate Guard
1244.description: For <style="accent-gn">10s</style> after casting <linktext=1562><style="ItemQuality_5">Shield Toss</style></linktext>, increases <linktext=1170><style="ItemQuality_5">Block Chance</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">15%</style>.

1245.name: Shield Guard
1245.description: <linktext=1561><style="ItemQuality_5">Valor Bash</style></linktext> heals for <style="accent-gn">120%</style> ATK when it deals DMG, and increases DMG dealt by <style="accent-gn">8%</style> for <style="accent-gn">8s</style>.

1247.name: Ultimate Strike
1247.description: When <linktext=1177><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Strike</style></linktext> deals DMG, increases <style="accent-gn">Strength</style> by <style="accent-gn">2%</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

1248.name: Magic Guard
1248.description: While <linktext=1565><style="ItemQuality_5">Aegis Ward</style></linktext> is active, each <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Mastery grants <style="accent-gn">0.5%</style> MATK Reduction, up to <style="accent-gn">30%</style>.

1251.name: Adversity Enhancement
1251.description: <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> and damaging <style="accent-gn">Expertise</style> are enhanced based on missing HP. For every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> HP lost, increases their DMG by <style="accent-gn">1%</style>.

1252.name: Wide Raid
1252.description:
Increases Zeal Crusade range by 100%. While
Zeal Crusade is active, the effect of Bold Fearless is doubled.

1253.name: Bold Fearless
1253.description:
When Sacred Blade or Judgment deals DMG, there is a fixed 25% chance to cause Vanguard Strike to evolve into Vanguard Hunt.
Vanguard Hunt: Deals Attack DMG equal to 240% ATK to the target, restores 2% of your max HP, and gains Bold Fearless.
Bold Fearless: Increases Haste by 3% for 10s, stacking up to 10 times.

1254.name: Radiant Core
1254.description:
Vanguard Hunt can grant Radiant Core.
Gaining Radiant Core again reduces its burst time by 2s.

1255.name: Conquest Pursuit
1255.description: While <linktext=1567><style="ItemQuality_5">Zeal Crusade</style></linktext> is active, <linktext=1566><style="ItemQuality_5">Vanguard Strike</style></linktext> evolves into <linktext=1176><style="ItemQuality_5">Vanguard Hunt</style></linktext>.

1256.name: Decisive Blade
1256.description: After <linktext=1198><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Core</style></linktext> explosion, <linktext=1559><style="ItemQuality_5">Sacred Blade</style></linktext> DMG +<style="accent-gn">100%</style> for <style="accent-gn">20s</style>. Holds up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> charges, casting <linktext=1559><style="ItemQuality_5">Sacred Blade</style></linktext> consumes one charge.

1257.name: Zeal Haste
1257.description: For every <style="accent-gn">15</style> points of <style="accent-gn">Photon Energy</style> consumed, the remaining CD of <linktext=1567><style="ItemQuality_5">Zeal Crusade</style></linktext> -<style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

1258.name: Holy Sigil Enhancement
1258.description: When <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> deals DMG, the target takes double DMG from <linktext=1199><style="ItemQuality_5">Holy Mark</style></linktext> for the next <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

1259.name: Divine Guard
1259.description:
When in the Divine Circle, reduces all DMG taken by 10%.
For each enemy within 10m, ATK Reduction increases by 1.5% (up to 9%), and MATK Reduction increases by 0.75% (up to 4.5%).

1260.name: Judgment Improvement
1260.description: For each <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext> you possess, <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> gains <style="accent-gn">2%</style> healing bonus. When <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext>≥<style="accent-gn">5</style> stacks, DMG Reduction +<style="accent-gn">8%</style>.

1261.name: Sigil Pursuit
1261.description: DMG dealt by <linktext=1176><style="ItemQuality_5">Vanguard Hunt</style></linktext> and <linktext=1559><style="ItemQuality_5">Sacred Blade</style></linktext> to targets with <linktext=1199><style="ItemQuality_5">Holy Mark</style></linktext> increases by <style="accent-gn">20%</style>.

1262.name: Overflow Healwall
1262.description: When your accumulated overhealing reaches <style="accent-gn">10%</style> of your Max HP, gains <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext>.

1263.name: Light Healing
1263.description: While having <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant Shield</style></linktext>, gains <style="accent-gn">12%</style> healing bonus.

1264.name: Light Protection
1264.description: While having <linktext=1172><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiant shield</style></linktext>, gain <style="accent-gn">5%</style> Light bonus.

1265.name: Resolved to Return
1265.description: Each time <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <linktext=1175><style="ItemQuality_5">Lightforged Barrier</style></linktext> is consumed or deducted, reduces the remaining CD of <linktext=1568><style="ItemQuality_5">Radiance</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

1266.name: Halo
1266.description: <linktext=1560><style="ItemQuality_5">Divine Circle</style></linktext> now has a halo effect, <linktext=3005><style="ItemQuality_5">stunning</style></linktext> enemy targets for <style="accent-gn">3s</style> the first time it deals DMG.

1267.name: Judgment Pursuit
1267.description: Every <style="accent-gn">50</style> times damage is taken, the next <linktext=1564><style="ItemQuality_5">Judgment</style></linktext> deals additional fixed damage equal to <style="accent-gn">5000%</style> of Armor. Can trigger at most once every <style="accent-gn">20</style>s. Every <style="accent-gn">2%</style> Mastery reduces the required times of damage taken by <style="accent-gn">1</style>. Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Crit reduces the trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">1%</style> (up to <style="accent-gn">50%</style>).

1300.name: Passion Surge
1300.description:
When Melody is active, there is a 15% fixed chance per second to gain Passion Surge.

Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Removed after Special Attack is cast.

1302.name: Heat Surge
1302.description:
When Melody is activated, the trigger chance for Passion Surge +an extra 3% every 1 second (up to 30%).

Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Removed after Special Attack is cast.

1303.name: Intellect Conversion
1303.description: Every <style="accent-gn">10</style> points of Intellect provides <style="accent-gn">1</style> point of MATK.

1305.name: Melody: Heat Core
1305.description: <linktext=1133><style="ItemQuality_5">Melody</style></linktext> heals ally targets below <style="accent-gn">50%</style> HP with <style="accent-gn">100%</style> bonus effect.

1306.name: Flame Pursuit
1306.description: After using <style="accent-gn">3</style> <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style>s, the next <style="accent-gn">Basic Attack</style> hit triggers <linktext=1190><style="ItemQuality_5">Flame Pillar Blast</style></linktext>.

1307.name: Flame Pursuit II
1307.description: <linktext=1190><style="ItemQuality_5">Flame Pillar Blast</style></linktext> becomes a two-hit combo.

1308.name: Dissonance Spec
1308.description:
While in Rhapsody of Flame, increases all Luck Chance acquired by any means by 50% and increases DMG Reduction by 25%.

Healing of Stillness: If you deal no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of your Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies (party members prioritized), with the full 4-hit combo restoring 15.75% of their max HP in total. After casting an Ultimate, Basic Attacks immediately start healing, and Fierce Strike can trigger the 4th hit healing effect, but this is disabled upon dealing DMG to enemies.

Maintaining Heroic Melody and Rhapsody of Flame is crucial. Heroic Melody enhances healing while consecutive Fierce Strikes accelerate Harmonic Anthem casting frequency.

1309.name: Lucky Soundwave
1309.description: Gains <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Soundwave Energy</style> whenever <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style>s or <linktext=1604><style="ItemQuality_5">Amplified Beat</style></linktext> trigger a Lucky Strike.

1310.name: Trio Rhapsody
1310.description:
Rhapsody of Flame always appears in its most powerful form.
While in Rhapsody of Flame, ATK increases by Haste % x 0.6.

1311.name: Severed Chapter
1311.description:
Increases Resilience Break Efficiency of self and Allies within 30 meters by 10%. This effect cannot stack.
After activating Heroic Melody, you and Allies within 30 meters have an resilience break efficiency +30% and deal 15% more DMG to Resilience Broken targets. This effect cannot stack.

1312.name: Sound Blaze
1312.description:
Gain 1 Soundwave Energy each time you deal DMG equal to 10 times ATK.
Soundwave Energy stores up to 50.
Skills consuming Performance Passion trigger Scorching Impact when dealing DMG, consuming all Soundwave Energy. Each 1 Soundwave Energy increases Scorching Impact DMG by 16%.

1313.name: Healing Note
1313.description:
Basic Attack deals an extra instance of DMG.
For every 5 Soundwave Energy obtained, creates a Note for the ally with the lowest HP.

1314.name: Blazing Heal
1314.description: Stores excess Healing (up to <style="accent-gn">500%</style> of Max HP). After activating <linktext=1614><style="ItemQuality_5">Heroic Melody</style></linktext>, consumes stored Healing to recover allies' HP every <style="accent-gn">1</style> second, up to <style="accent-gn">15%</style> of Max HP per second.

1315.name: Concerto
1315.description:
During Rhapsody of Flame, Amplified Beat gains 1 additional attack.
Amplified Beat's DMG -20%.

1316.name: Restart
1316.description: When <linktext=1605><style="ItemQuality_5">Harmonic Anthem</style></linktext> or <linktext=1615><style="ItemQuality_5">Fierce Strike</style></linktext> triggers a Lucky Strike, limited to a single activation when striking multiple targets, immediately resets <linktext=1603><style="ItemQuality_5">Rhapsody of Flame</style></linktext>'s CD and allows <linktext=1603><style="ItemQuality_5">Rhapsody of Flame</style></linktext> not to consume <style="accent-gn">Performance Passion</style> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, this effect is nullified upon casting <linktext=1603><style="ItemQuality_5">Rhapsody of Flame</style></linktext>.

1317.name: Concerto Spec
1317.description:
Replaces Special Attack with Healing Beat. While
Healing Melody is active, reduces the remaining CD of Fivefold Crescendo and Passion Burst by 1 second per second.

Precisely placing the speaker ensures it echoes your Expertise whenever they are cast.

1318.name: Brilliant Charge
1318.description: When <linktext=1609><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Beat</style></linktext> or <linktext=1608><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Burst</style></linktext> applies Crit Healing or deals Crit DMG (triggers only once when hitting multiple targets), gains <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Performance Passion</style>.

1319.name: Double Recovery Note
1319.description: <linktext=1609><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Beat</style></linktext> provides an additional equal Healing to targets under the influence of <linktext=1606><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Melody</style></linktext>.

1322.name: Critical Encore
1322.description: Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Crit Rate grants <style="accent-gn">1%</style> trigger chance for <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext>.

1323.name: Passion Fury
1323.description: For each <style="accent-gn">10</style> <style="accent-gn">Performance Passion</style> consumed, enhances <linktext=1608><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Burst</style></linktext> to <linktext=1617><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Fury</style></linktext> for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

1324.name: Stat Resonance
1324.description: While <linktext=1606><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Melody</style></linktext> is active, grants allies appropriate buffs (<style="accent-gn">Strength</style>, <style="accent-gn">Intellect</style>, <style="accent-gn">Agility</style>) equal to <style="accent-gn">8%</style> of <style="accent-gn">Intellect</style>. (Buffs from different Beat Performers cannot stack. Only one with the highest value applies.)

1325.name: Stat Resonance Crit
1325.description: For <style="accent-gn">10s</style></linktext> after using <linktext=1608><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Burst</style></linktext> or its enhanced form (<linktext=1617><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Fury</style>), doubles the buffs that <linktext=1606><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Melody</style></linktext> provides to allies. While channeling <linktext=1617><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Fury</style></linktext>, DMG Reduction +<style="accent-gn">10%</style>. The duration of the doubled stat buffs is refreshed and extended by <style="accent-gn">0.4</style>s for every <style="accent-gn">0.2</style>s channeled.

1326.name: Fire Day
1326.description: Increases Fire Bonus by <style="accent-gn">8%</style> when attacking Elite or higher targets.

1327.name: Critical Acclaim
1327.description:
During Center Stage, triggering Encore Strings has a 30% fixed chance to grant Passion Surge.

Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Removed after Special Attack is cast.

1328.name: Rhythm Spirit
1328.description: Defeating an enemy has a fixed <style="accent-gn">50%</style> chance to grant you <style="accent-gn">1</style> <style="accent-gn">Performance Passion</style>.

1331.name: Encore Chain
1331.description: When <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext> triggers, it activates a second time on the same target.

1333.name: Variation
1333.description:
Increases Max HP by 20% and activates Dissonance Spec with its original effect intact.
If Concerto Spec is activated, its effect is adjusted to replace Basic Attack with Resonant Strings.

1334.name: Melody Chord
1334.description:
Melody Healing +20%.
Each 1% Haste increases the REG SPD of Performance Passion by 1%.

1336.name: Indomitable Chord
1336.description:
While Heroic Melody is active, grants Super Armor, increases DMG Reduction by 25%, and boosts Movement Speed by 10%.
While Heroic Melody is active, grants Tenacity Chord. Each stack of Tenacity Chord additionally increases Max HP by 0.5% (up to 2.5% Max HP) for 5s (duration cannot be refreshed once 5 stacks are reached).

1337.name: Swing Reflux
1337.description: Hitting a target with <linktext=1615><style="ItemQuality_5">Fierce Strike</style></linktext> recovers <style="accent-gn">5</style> <style="accent-gn">Performance Energy</style>. <style="accent-gn">Each</style> additional target hit provides <style="accent-gn">1</style> extra <style="accent-gn">Performance Energy</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> total.

1338.name: Luck Multiplier
1338.description:
Every 1% Luck grants 0.5% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier.
After activating Heroic Melody, doubles its conversion efficiency.

1339.name: Resonant Counterpoint
1339.description: When a <linktext=1192><style="ItemQuality_5">Note</style></linktext> forms, there's a <style="accent-gn">50%</style> fixed chance to create an extra <linktext=1192><style="ItemQuality_5">Note</style></linktext> for a different target.

1340.name: Sonic Cure
1340.description: When <style="accent-gn">Expertise</style> deal DMG (only triggers once when hitting multiple targets), additionally heal targets with <linktext=1192><style="ItemQuality_5">Note</style></linktext>.

1341.name: Sonic Therapy
1341.description: Converted healing from DMG +<style="accent-gn">20%</style> for targets affected by <linktext=1192><style="ItemQuality_5">Note</style></linktext>.

1342.name: Flame's Rampage
1342.description:
When Heroic Melody is active, Rhapsody of Flame will erupt, dealing Magic DMG equal to 350% ATK every 3s to targets it touches (DMG interval affected by Haste). This DMG can trigger Lucky Strike.
While in Rhapsody of Flame, each hit of Harmonic Anthem also heals 1 ally with the lowest HP for 30% of the DMG dealt (this value scales proportionally when hitting multiple targets).

1343.name: Flame Note
1343.description: When you use an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style>, <linktext=1603><style="ItemQuality_5">Rhapsody of Flame</style></linktext> will erupt with Rhythm, dealing <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">700%</style> of ATK and granting <linktext=1192><style="ItemQuality_5">Note</style></linktext> to allies it touches.

1344.name: Finale Command
1344.description: Within <style="accent-gn">10s</style> of casting <linktext=1616><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore</style></linktext>, each use of <linktext=1603><style="ItemQuality_5">Rhapsody of Flame</style></linktext> caused targets affected by <linktext=1616><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore</style></linktext> to trigger <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext>.

1345.name: Encore Persistence
1345.description:
Permanently benefits from Encore effect.
For every 5 triggers of Encore Strings, the next Amplified Beat and Harmonic Anthem deal 50% more DMG.

1346.name: Encore Luck Boost
1346.description: Every <style="accent-gn">1%</style> Luck Chance grants <style="accent-gn">1%</style> trigger chance for <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext>.

1347.name: Encore Sharp Strike
1347.description: Triggering <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext> to deal DMG or healing grants <style="accent-gn">2</style> <style="accent-gn">Performance Energy</style>. If the <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext> triggers Lucky Strike, grants <style="accent-gn">3</style> additional <style="accent-gn">Performance Energy</style>.

1348.name: Absolute Center Stage
1348.description: After you use <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext>, the number of enhanced skills increases from <style="accent-gn">1</style> to <style="accent-gn">2</style>.

1349.name: Center Stage: Mad Tune
1349.description: <style="accent-gn">Each</style> <style="accent-gn">Performance Passion</style> consumed reduces the CD of <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">1</style> second.

1350.name: Tower Multiwave
1350.description: Casting <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext> immediately extends <linktext=1614><style="ItemQuality_5">Heroic Melody</style></linktext> by <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

1351.name: Soundwave Overclock
1351.description: Upon casting <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext>, grants <style="accent-gn">15</style> <style="accent-gn">Soundwave Energy</style>, and doubles all the <style="accent-gn">Soundwave Energy</style> gained in the next <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

1352.name: Crit Charge Rhythm
1352.description:
Fivefold Crescendo deals Crit DMG or healing (only triggers once for multiple targets), grants 2 Performance Energy. When
Healing Melody lands a Crit Hit, grants 1 Performance Energy(only triggers once for multiple targets).

1353.name: Tower Flame Blast
1353.description: The speaker releases a <linktext=1197><style="ItemQuality_5">Flame Shock</style></linktext> every <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

1354.name: Multi-Target Heat Amp
1354.description: <linktext=1608><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Burst</style></linktext> and its enhanced version (<linktext=1617><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Fury</style></linktext>) deal <style="accent-gn">5%</style> more DMG <style="accent-gn">per</style> additional target hit, up to <style="accent-gn">25%</style>.

1355.name: Heated Tower Flame Blast
1355.description: When <linktext=1608><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Burst</style></linktext> and its enhanced version (<linktext=1617><style="ItemQuality_5">Passion Fury</style></linktext>) hit the speaker, it immediately releases a <linktext=1197><style="ItemQuality_5">Flame Shock</style></linktext>.

1356.name: Sonic Verdict
1356.description:
While Healing Melody is active, Fivefold Crescendo also deals DMG, with its total DMG scaling equal to its healing multiplier.
While Healing Melody is active, reduces the caster's DMG taken by (10% + Haste % x 0.4) (max -30%).

1357.name: Harmonic Amplifier
1357.description: Increases the DMG dealt and healing of skills triggered by the speaker by <style="accent-gn">30%</style>.

1358.name: Crescendo Healing Chord
1358.description:
Healing Melody gains 7% Healing Strength for every second it remains active, stacking up to 5 times.
Healing Melody additionally restores a fixed amount equal to 0.3% of the target's Max HP when healing.

1359.name: Crit Scale
1359.description:
Increases Crit Rate by 10% against enemies above 50% HP.
Increases Crit Rate by 10% against enemies below 50% HP.

1360.name: Symphonic Aria
1360.description: Enhances Healing by <style="accent-gn">10%</style> for targets affected by <linktext=1606><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Melody</style></linktext>.

1361.name: Vitality Unleash
1361.description: <style="accent-gn">7%</style> of DMG dealt and <style="accent-gn">15%</style> of healing done is stored as Rhythm. Within <style="accent-gn">10s</style> after you cast <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext>, the use of <style="accent-gn">Expertise</style> and <linktext=1609><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Beat</style></linktext> consumes Rhythm to grant up to <style="accent-gn">40%</style> bonus healing. The cap for Rhythm storage is <style="accent-gn">30</style> times MATK.

1362.name: Encore Chain
1362.description: Within <style="accent-gn">10s</style> after you cast <linktext=1616><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore</style></linktext>, each use of <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> triggers <linktext=1193><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore Strings</style></linktext> for targets affected by <linktext=1616><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore</style></linktext>.

1363.name: Tower Resonance
1363.description:
Permanently benefits from Encore effect.
Each trigger of Encore Strings reduces the remaining CD of Expertise by 1 second.

1364.name: Stat Resonance Overload
1364.description: For <style="accent-gn">15s</style> after actively casting <linktext=1616><style="ItemQuality_5">Encore</style></linktext>, the stat bonuses provided by <linktext=1606><style="ItemQuality_5">Healing Melody</style></linktext> are +<style="accent-gn">100%</style>.

1365.name: Center Stage: Concerto
1365.description: The charges of <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext> increase by <style="accent-gn">1</style>.

1366.name: Absolute Center Stage
1366.description: After you use <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext>, the number of enhanced skills increases from <style="accent-gn">1</style> to <style="accent-gn">2</style>.

1367.name: Spiral Flame
1367.description: After casting <linktext=1610><style="ItemQuality_5">Center Stage</style></linktext>, summon a wave of <linktext=1173><style="ItemQuality_5">Sonic Surge</style></linktext>.

3901.name: Inferno Ogre
3901.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into</style> Boss: Inferno Ogre to unleash a forward fiery breath that deals <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> and <linktext=3000><style="ItemQuality_5">interrupts</style></linktext> affected targets. Concurrently, applies <style="accent-gn">Healing</style> to you, and <style="accent-gn">100%</style> excess healing is converted into a <style="accent-gn">Shield</style> lasting <style="accent-gn">20s</style>. The transformed form reduces DMG taken by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>.

3902.name: Tempest Ogre
3902.dialogue: Darkness, to be illuminated by thunder!
3902.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Boss</style>: Tempest Ogre and channels the power of thunder to generate a vortex, continuously pulling in enemies near the target and dealing AoE <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> when the duration ends.
passiveBufDescriptions: Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, unleashes a lightning strike on a random nearby target, dealing <style="magic">Thunder</style> <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">37.3%</style> ATK. Taking DMG reduces the lightning trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>. Each trigger reduces the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">0.5</style>, and targets hit deal <style="accent-gn">5%</style> less DMG to you for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, unleashes a lightning strike on a random nearby target, dealing <style="magic">Thunder</style> <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">48.49%</style> ATK. Taking DMG reduces the lightning trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>. Each trigger reduces the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">0.5</style>, and targets hit deal <style="accent-gn">5%</style> less DMG to you for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, unleashes a lightning strike on a random nearby target, dealing <style="magic">Thunder</style> <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">59.68%</style> ATK. Taking DMG reduces the lightning trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>. Each trigger reduces the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">0.5</style>, and targets hit deal <style="accent-gn">5%</style> less DMG to you for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, unleashes a lightning strike on a random nearby target, dealing <style="magic">Thunder</style> <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">70.87%</style> ATK. Taking DMG reduces the lightning trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>. Each trigger reduces the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">1</style>, and targets hit deal <style="accent-gn">8%</style> less DMG to you for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, unleashes a lightning strike on a random nearby target, dealing <style="magic">Thunder</style> <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">82.06%</style> ATK. Taking DMG reduces the lightning trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>. Each trigger reduces the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">1</style>, and targets hit deal <style="accent-gn">8%</style> less DMG to you for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, unleashes a lightning strike on a random nearby target, dealing <style="magic">Thunder</style> <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">93.25%</style> ATK. Taking DMG reduces the lightning trigger interval by <style="accent-gn">0.5s</style>. Each trigger reduces the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">2</style>, and targets hit deal <style="accent-gn">10%</style> less DMG to you for <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.

3903.name: Brigand Leader
3903.dialogue: Come, feel the heat of my battle axe!
3903.description:
Transforms into Boss: Brigand Leader and summons a blazing giant axe, increasing the party's ATK within range for a period and granting yourself additional ATK boost.
(This effect cannot stack and only one can be active at a time.)
passiveBufDescriptions: When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Applies a burn effect to the target, dealing Fire <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">29.1%ATK</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

3904.name: Muku Warrior
3904.dialogue: Come on, feel the tremor of battle!
3904.description:
Summons Elite: Muku Warrior to leap forward and deliver a powerful strike, dealing AoE Attack DMG. This attack is guaranteed to Crit.
Upon the skill cast, your Crit and Crit DMG are increased for a period.

3905.name: Boarrier Tyrant
3905.dialogue: Roar, are you ready for the savage charge!
3905.description:
Summons Elite: Boarrier Tyrant to charge forward with tusks for 3s. Deals Attack DMG and knocks enemies airborne during the charge. Boarrier tusks tear through flesh, inflicting 100% Wound on enemies hit for 15s.
Upon the skill cast, the DMG dealt and healing of your Special Attack are increased for a period.

3906.name: Frost Ogre
3906.description:
Summons Boss: Frost Ogre to execute a spinning attack with an ice hammer, resulting in Attack DMG and freezing all targets on hit.
Upon the skill cast, your Resilience Break Bonus is increased for a period.

3907.name: Inferno Goblin Mage
3907.description:
Transforms into Elite: Inferno Goblin Mage and summons meteors from the sky, dealing Magic DMG and interrupting the target's actions.
Upon the skill cast, your Intellect is increased for a period.

3908.description:
Summons Boss: Muku King to channel Forest Energy, healing up to 10 allies over time and dispelling debuffs.
Upon the skill cast, your healing received is increased for a period.

3910.name: ​Void Ogre
3910.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Elite</style>: Void Ogre, roars in place, and fires 6 whirlwind-like Void Projectiles at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style>. Inflicts Void Corruption Decay on the target for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, dealing <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> per second, up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> stacks. <style="accent-gn">100%</style> of the DMG dealt over time is converted into your HP.

3911.name: Tatta
3911.description:
Summons Tatta to grant Battle Will to the entire team, preventing all allies from being defeated and ensuring their HP does not fall below a certain threshold for a period of time.
Exhausted: Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s (Exhausted effects are enhanced in party dungeons of Nightmare mode).

3913.name: Shadow Captain
3913.description:
Transforms into Elite: Shadow Captain to launch an Electro Bomb at the designated target, dealing AoE Attack DMG and interrupting the target's actions.
Upon the skill cast, the DMG dealt and healing of your Expertise Skill are increased for a period.
passiveBufDescriptions: Expertise Skill DMG and healing <style="accent-gn">+6%</style>

3914.name: Goblin Guard

Summons Elite: Goblin Guard to perform multiple sword energy attacks forward, dealing Attack DMG. Sword energy hits will reduce the target's Armor.
(The effect cannot stack, and only one effect of the same type will be effective.)
Upon the skill cast, your Block DMG reduction is increased for a period.

3915.description:
Summons Elite: Goblin Warrior to shoot in a fan-shaped area in front, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Luck and Lucky Strike Chance are increased for a period.

All Heavy Slash charges are consumed in the process to significantly amplify the DMG inflicted.

3921.name: Tina
3921.description:
Summons Tina to channel the power of time, reducing the Skill CDs of yourself and up to 10 surrounding allies for a certain period.
(Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s.)

3922.name: Olvera
3922.dialogue: Don't blink, this is the cold light slashing towards you!
3922.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons</style> Olvera to shuttle back and forth in a forward direction, drawing in enemies encountered along the path, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style>, and <linktext=3000><style="ItemQuality_5">interrupting</style></linktext> their actions. When dealing DMG, there is a chance to inflict Seed of Lightning on the targets for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>. Dealing DMG to targets with Seed of Lightning will cause an explosion (CD: <style="accent-gn">2s</style>), dealing <style="magic">Magic DMG</style>. Any target with Seed of Lightning defeated will reduce CD time by <style="accent-gn">20s</style>.

3923.name: Muku Chief
3923.dialogue: Smash! Smash! Smash! Destruction is art!
3923.description:
Summons Boss: Muku Chief to slam the ground around, dealing AoE Attack DMG. Holds 2 charges.
Upon the skill cast, your Crit and Crit DMG are increased for a period.

3925.name: Mighty Colossus
3925.description:
Transforms into Elite: Mighty Colossus to charge and deal Attack DMG. The longer you charge, the greater the effect on Resilience breaking. Each stack increases the Resilience Break done by 50%. (3 stacks at Tier 3 and 6 stacks at Tier 5.)
Upon the skill cast, your Resilience Break Bonus is increased for a period.

3927.name: Jungle Goblin Warrior
3927.dialogue: Roar... no one can stop me!
3927.description:
Summons Elite: Jungle Goblin Warrior and roars.
Casts the skill, temporarily boosting Strength, empowering the next attack to deal bonus Attack DMG in a limited area, and interrupting the target's actions.

3928.name: Muku Scout
3928.dialogue: Haven't you heard? No matter how skilled in martial arts, one still fears a kitchen knife!
3928.description:
Summons Elite: Muku Scout to chase the target, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, immediately gains full passive effects, and the stack count is doubled within 20s.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">2.6%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">3.2%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">5%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

3929.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into Elite</style>: Void Arachnocrab, and gains <style="accent-gn">Invincibility</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

3934.name: Brigand Scout Leader

Summons Elite: Brigand Scout Leader to execute continuous attacks on the designated target, dealing Attack DMG and interrupting their actions.
Upon the skill cast, your Agility is increased for a period.

3935.name: Golden Juggernaut

Transforms into Boss: Golden Juggernaut, granting yourself and 10 allies Shield. When dealing DMG, the shielded targets generate Thunderstrike (CD: 0.5s), and the DMG dealt depends on the friendly ATK.
(This effect cannot stack and only one will be effective.)

3936.name: Lizardman Mage
3936.description:
Summons Elite: Lizardman Mage to conjure the Water of Silence at the target's location, dealing Magic DMG and inflicting Slow.
Upon the skill cast, your Ice Bonus is increased for a period.

3937.name: Lizardman Hunter
3937.description:
Summons Elite: Lizardman Hunter to chant briefly, dealing Magic DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Luck and Lucky Strike Chance are increased for a period.

Following a brief delay, the cocoon bursts, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> and <linktext=3000><style="ItemQuality_5">interrupting</style></linktext> the actions of the affected target. Your <style="accent-gn">Mastery</style> is increased for a period.

3939.description:
Summons Elite: Great Warhog to release a Lightning Orb forward, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Light Bonus is increased for a period.

Summons Elite: Storm Goblin Warrior to continuously release Whirlwind Slash, dealing Attack DMG and pulling in all surrounding units.

After casting, your <style="accent-gn">Haste</style> is increased for a period of time.

3945.name: Lizardman King
3945.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Boss</style>: Lizardman King to deal Ice <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> to nearby enemies and <linktext=3001><style="ItemQuality_5">Silence</style></linktext> them for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.

3946.name: Goblin King
3946.dialogue: Are you ready? Full army attack!
3946.description:
Resonates with the power of Boss: Goblin King, summoning 1–3 goblins at random to cast skills.
Always summons 1 from Elite: Goblin Guard or Elite: Goblin Warrior.
Has a chance to additionally summon 1 Elite: Jungle Goblin Warrior.
Has a chance to summon 1 from Elite: Storm Goblin Axe or Boss: Storm Goblin King. Has a 30% chance to summon the Boss.
activeEffectParams: Additional Probability to Summon Elite or Boss

3947.name: Muku Vanguard
3947.description:
Summons Elite: Muku Vanguard to charge forward, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Thunder Bonus is increased for a period.

3948.name: Rorola
3948.dialogue: Do you feel it? The presence of the ancestors. They have never forsaken the Kanamia Tribe.
3948.description:
Summons Rorola, resonating with the power of ancestors to gain a damage boost for some time. Also, every 10 hits on targets grant an additional damage boost, stacking up to 5 times. Once the cap is reached, subsequent hits extend the duration of the additional boost (the duration of the Base DMG boost does not extend). Each extension adds 3s, with a maximum of 5 extensions. At the same time, grants the Life Steal effect, restoring HP equal to a portion of damage dealt (the duration can extend).
This skill holds 2 charges.

3949.name: Dorothy
3949.dialogue: Technique is born from practice, but true artistry is born from responsibility.
3949.description:
Transforms into Dorothy, replacing basic attack modules and gaining Artisan's Power.
Passive: Dealing damage has a 40% chance to trigger Chain Lightning (trigger interval: at least 0.5s).
① Charges and fires a powerful shot at the target, dealing Attack DMG. Each additional charge increases the damage by 150%.
② Leaps into the air and launches a Thunderstorm Bolt at the target, dealing Attack DMG and creating a Thunderstorm Zone at the target for 7s. Thunderstorm Zone deals Attack DMG per second to enemies within and slows them.
③ Continuously unleashes Thunder Tracers, dealing Attack DMG and inflicting Paralysis on hit.
④ Fires an Oblivion Bomb, which explodes after traveling a distance or upon impact, dealing Attack DMG.

3950.name: Boyce
3950.dialogue: The truth of the world is meant to be this orderly, with no room for the slightest chaos.
3950.description:
Summons Boyce to create a field of frost by concentrating ice power, dealing Ice Magic DMG.
After casting, your ATK is increased for a period of time. Each cast of a Special Attack grants an additional increase, stacking up to 5 times. At max stacks, gain a bonus to Attack SPD and Casting SPD. Performing a Special Attack extends this bonus's duration by 3s, up to a max of 5 times (The ATK bonus's duration is not affected).
This skill holds 2 charges.

3951.name: Fafala
3951.dialogue: I'm truly happy that I can be of help to everyone! Please, don't stand on ceremony.
3951.description:
Summons Fafala to create a field.
You and allies within the field gain Final DMG Reduction and Super Armor. When you deal damage from inside the field, inflict bonus damage based on a percentage of your DEF (can trigger at most once every 1s). When you take damage, reduce the CD of this Skill by 1s (can trigger at most once every 2s).
[This effect does not stack. Only one instance of this effect can be active at a time.

3952.name: Blackstone Captain
3952.dialogue: Maintain vigilance. Any lapse in concentration is fatal.
3952.description:
Summons Boss: Blackstone Captain to ignite flames centered on yourself, dealing Fire Attack DMG.
After casting, your Attack SPD and Casting SPD are increased for a period of time.
passiveBufDescriptions: Ultimate Skill CD speed <style="accent-gn">+13%</style>

3953.name: Goblin Chief
3953.dialogue: Straighten up, you maggots! Your boss is here!
3953.description:
Summons Boss: Goblin Chief to briefly charge up and unleash a forward blade wave that deals Attack DMG.
After casting, your Expertise Skill's DMG and healing are increased for a period of time. During this time, dealing damage with an Expertise Skill reduces the CD of this Skill by 0.3s (can trigger at most once every 1s).

3954.name: Crimson Foxen
3954.description:
Summons Boss: Crimson Foxen to spin and pounce on the target, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, your Companion ATK is increased for a period of time.

3955.name: Cabbage Kingpin
3955.dialogue: Target acquired! Crushing blow!... (Misses) *Cough, cough* Ahem! Merely a strategic feint to test your resolve!
3955.description:
Summons Boss: Cabbage Kingpin to briefly charge up and slam the ground with a hammer, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, your passive effect is locked to the displayed sigil for 20s, and its effect is increased by 100%-150%.

3956.name: Flamehorn
3956.dialogue: I am the fury of the earth, and the last ember of the forest!
3956.description:
Summons Boss: Flamehorn to repeatedly ram the target with its horns, dealing Attack DMG.
Grants a Luck effect: Triggering a Lucky Strike causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Magic DMG (cooldown: 0.1s), and immediately grants the Absolute Luck effect. For the duration, Absolute Luck's cooldown becomes 5s.

3957.name: Basilisk
3957.dialogue: The very earth trembles beneath my feet, intruder!
3957.description:
Summons Boss: Basilisk to spin toward the target, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, grants an All-Element Bonus to you and up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates) for a period of time.
(Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s)

3958.name: Bluespine Lizard
3958.description:
Summons Elite: Bluespine Lizard to breathe frost forward, dealing Attack DMG to targets in the area.
After casting, increases Versatility for a period of time.

3959.name: Blackstone Commander
3959.dialogue: A chaotic magic source has been detected. In accordance with Legion law, I shall neutralize it.
3959.description:
Summons Elite: Blackstone Commander to call down lightning from the sky, dealing Magic DMG.
For a period of time after the skill is cast, when you deal damage, you will also deal additional Attack DMG to the target equal to a percentage of your Armor (can trigger at most once every 1s).

3960.name: Blackstone Vanguard
3960.dialogue: At last, a moving target! Come, have a taste of my blade!
3960.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into</style> Elite: Blackstone Vanguard to perform a spinning attack that deals Fire <style="physical">Attack DMG</style>. Every stack of Blade Intent allows for an additional spin (up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> stacks). This damage benefits from all types of elemental bonuses and is not affected by passive effects.

Reduces your total damage dealt by 80%
