3961.dialogue: You've just stepped into my "friendly" little welcoming trap!
3961.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons</style> Elite: Goblin Trickster to channel for a long time before dealing massive AoE <style="magic">Magic DMG</style>. (This skill damages enemies and up to <style="accent-gn">20</style> allies!)

3962.name: Goblin Shaman
3962.dialogue: Hiss-kaka! New test subject! Let me give you a little prick.
3962.description:
Summons Elite: Goblin Shaman to briefly channel before summoning an exploding magic orb. The explosion deals Magic DMG to targets in the area and heals up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates).
After casting, for 20s, you deal damage every 2s to the surrounding area equal to 50% of the self-healing from your Class Skills.
passiveBufDescriptions: Every <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, your next hit includes an additional <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">45%</style> ATK. Each time you grant healing, increases your next such damage by <style="accent-gn">5%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">+800%</style> (this damage cannot trigger Crit)

3963.name: Blackfire Foxen
3963.description:
Summons Elite: Blackfire Foxen to pounce on, bite, and then swipe its tail at the target, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, your Mastery is increased for a period of time.

3964.name: Gloomy Cabbage
3964.dialogue: This blade of mine bears the weight of a thousand leaves... Yikes!
3964.description:
Summons Elite: Gloomy Cabbage to briefly charge up and swing a greatsword, dealing Attack DMG to targets in the area.
After casting, your Crit and Crit DMG are increased for a while (the values fluctuate based on the Cabbage sigil).

3966.name: Emerald Caprahorn
3966.dialogue: The forest will remember your passage, whether in kindness or in malice.
3966.description:
Summons Elite: Emerald Caprahorn to fire two consecutive projectiles, dealing Attack DMG to targets in the area.
After casting, your Haste is increased for a period of time.

3968.name: Denvel
3968.description:
Summons Denvel to attract nearby monsters and deal Attack DMG.
After casting, grants a temporary enhancement: the user takes damage equal to 0.1% of Max HP every 0.2s and gains a DMG boost, with an additional boost for every 100,000 Max HP (Total base and extra DMG boost is capped, and the Max HP requirement is adjusted each season).
This skill holds 2 charges.

3969.description:
Summons Igoreus to deal Attack DMG. Holds 2 charges.

3970.name: Plague Nappo
3970.description:
Summons Plague Nappo. The Nappo's attack method and skill effects change based on the type of skill cast previously.
If cast directly or after a Special Attack, summons Stormblade Nappo to deal AoE Attack DMG once, and reduces the current Resonance Skill's CD by 81.25%.
If cast after an Expertise Skill, summons Marksman Nappo to deal Attack DMG to a single target, and reduces the current Resonance Skill's CD by 68.75%.
If cast after an Ultimate, summons Wind Knight Nappo to deal Attack DMG once, reduces the current Resonance Skill's CD by 25%, and temporarily increases your DMG.
If cast after another Resonance Skill, summons Beat Performer Nappo to reduce the CD of the previously cast Resonance Skill (excluding this one).
passiveBufDescriptions: Casting Class Skills reduces the CD of the current Resonance Skill's active effect by <style="accent-gn">0.2</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>).
Casting Class Skills reduces the CD of the current Resonance Skill's active effect by <style="accent-gn">0.3</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>).
Casting Class Skills reduces the CD of the current Resonance Skill's active effect by <style="accent-gn">0.3</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>).
Casting Class Skills reduces the CD of the current Resonance Skill's active effect by <style="accent-gn">0.4</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>).
Casting Class Skills reduces the CD of the current Resonance Skill's active effect by <style="accent-gn">0.4</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>).
Casting Class Skills reduces the CD of the current Resonance Skill's active effect by <style="accent-gn">0.5</style> (triggers up to once every <style="accent-gn">1s</style>).

3971.name: Kartgriff
3971.description:
Summons Kartgriff to deal Magic DMG.
After casting, temporarily grants a Main Stats and Healing Received boost to you and up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates).
(Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s.)
passiveBufDescriptions: Current Spec's Strength/Intellect/Agility <style="accent-gn">+6%</style>, Healing <style="accent-gn">+8%</style>.
Current Spec's Strength/Intellect/Agility <style="accent-gn">+7.8%</style>, Healing <style="accent-gn">+10.4%</style>.

3972.name: Predator Spider
3972.description:
Summons Boss: Predator Spider to deal Attack DMG.
After casting, your passive ATK bonus is temporarily enhanced according to your Mastery Percentage. Every 5% Mastery grants extra ATK for each passive stack (up to a max limit).
passiveBufDescriptions: Expertise Skill DMG increased by <style="accent-gn">1.2%</style> of ATK. Grants 1 additional stack for every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Haste, up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, lasting <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Expertise Skill DMG increased by <style="accent-gn">1.56%</style> of ATK. Grants 1 additional stack for every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Haste, up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, lasting <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Expertise Skill DMG increased by <style="accent-gn">1.92%</style> of ATK. Grants 1 additional stack for every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Haste, up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, lasting <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Expertise Skill DMG increased by <style="accent-gn">2.28%</style> of ATK. Grants 1 additional stack for every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Haste, up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, lasting <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Expertise Skill DMG increased by <style="accent-gn">2.64%</style> of ATK. Grants 1 additional stack for every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Haste, up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, lasting <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Expertise Skill DMG increased by <style="accent-gn">3%</style> of ATK. Grants 1 additional stack for every <style="accent-gn">10%</style> Haste, up to <style="accent-gn">7</style> stacks, lasting <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.
activeEffectParams: Extra ATK Boost Per Stack Limit

3973.name: Rebel King
3973.description:
Summons Boss: Rebel King to deal Attack DMG.
After casting, temporarily grants full passive stacks, with the effect multiplied by 2.
passiveBufDescriptions: Casting a Class Skill different from the previous one (excluding Basic Attacks) grants a <style="accent-gn">1.6%</style> Elemental Bonus, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times. Casting the same skill resets the stacks. At max stacks, stacks can no longer be gained or lost for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, and are cleared when the duration ends.

Casting a Class Skill different from the previous one (excluding Basic Attacks) grants a <style="accent-gn">2.08%</style> Elemental Bonus, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times. Casting the same skill resets the stacks. At max stacks, stacks can no longer be gained or lost for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, and are cleared when the duration ends.

Casting a Class Skill different from the previous one (excluding Basic Attacks) grants a <style="accent-gn">2.56%</style> Elemental Bonus, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times. Casting the same skill resets the stacks. At max stacks, stacks can no longer be gained or lost for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, and are cleared when the duration ends.

Casting a Class Skill different from the previous one (excluding Basic Attacks) grants a <style="accent-gn">3.04%</style> Elemental Bonus, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times. Casting the same skill resets the stacks. At max stacks, stacks can no longer be gained or lost for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, and are cleared when the duration ends.

Casting a Class Skill different from the previous one (excluding Basic Attacks) grants a <style="accent-gn">3.52%</style> Elemental Bonus, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times. Casting the same skill resets the stacks. At max stacks, stacks can no longer be gained or lost for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, and are cleared when the duration ends.

Casting a Class Skill different from the previous one (excluding Basic Attacks) grants a <style="accent-gn">4%</style> Elemental Bonus, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times. Casting the same skill resets the stacks. At max stacks, stacks can no longer be gained or lost for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, and are cleared when the duration ends.

3974.name: Void Watcher
3974.description:
Summons Boss: Void Watcher, dealing Magic DMG and occupying an area for a period of time.
You and your teammates within the area gain increased ATK, Attack SPD, and Casting SPD. The effect on yourself is multiplied by 2.5.
(Does not stack; only one of the same effect may be active.)
passiveBufDescriptions: Casting a healing skill deals <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">80%</style> of ATK to nearby enemies (each time a healing skill is cast, this damage effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">20%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>).

Casting a healing skill deals <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">104%</style> of ATK to nearby enemies (each time a healing skill is cast, this damage effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">26%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>).

Casting a healing skill deals <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">128%</style> of ATK to nearby enemies (each time a healing skill is cast, this damage effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">32%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>).

Casting a healing skill deals <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">152%</style> of ATK to nearby enemies (each time a healing skill is cast, this damage effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">38%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>).

Casting a healing skill deals <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">176%</style> of ATK to nearby enemies (each time a healing skill is cast, this damage effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">44%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>).

Casting a healing skill deals <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">200%</style> of ATK to nearby enemies (each time a healing skill is cast, this damage effect is increased by <style="accent-gn">50%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> times for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>).

3975.name: Ridge Fang
3975.description:
Summons Boss: Ridge Fang to deal Attack DMG.
After casting, instantly resets Survival Instinct CD. You remain Invigorated temporarily, and your Armor and Max HP are increased.
passiveBufDescriptions:
When HP is above 90%, grants Invigorated: Super Armor and immunity to status effects
. Upon taking lethal DMG, grants Survival Instinct: HP will not fall below 1% for 1, and restores 4% HP per second (triggers at most once every 90).

When HP is above 90%, grants Invigorated: Super Armor and immunity to status effects
. Upon taking lethal DMG, grants Survival Instinct: HP will not fall below 1% for 1, and restores 5.2% HP per second (triggers at most once every 85).

When HP is above 90%, grants Invigorated: Super Armor and immunity to status effects
. Upon taking lethal DMG, grants Survival Instinct: HP will not fall below 1% for 1, and restores 6.4% HP per second (triggers at most once every 80).

When HP is above 90%, grants Invigorated: Super Armor and immunity to status effects
. Upon taking lethal DMG, grants Survival Instinct: HP will not fall below 1% for 1.5, and restores 7.6% HP per second (triggers at most once every 73).

When HP is above 90%, grants Invigorated: Super Armor and immunity to status effects
. Upon taking lethal DMG, grants Survival Instinct: HP will not fall below 1% for 1.5, and restores 8.8% HP per second (triggers at most once every 68).

When HP is above 90%, grants Invigorated: Super Armor and immunity to status effects
. Upon taking lethal DMG, grants Survival Instinct: HP will not fall below 1% for 2, and restores 10% HP per second (triggers at most once every 60).

3976.name: Bloodthirsty Furball
3976.description:
Summons Boss: Bloodthirsty Furball to deal Attack DMG.
For a period of time after casting, every time your Class Skills and Luck effect deal damage, they add extra damage on top of the skill's base value, equal to a certain percentage of your ATK.
passiveBufDescriptions: For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of DMG dealt by Class Skills (each attack counts only once), the next DMG instance additionally deals AoE Adaptive <style="physical">Attack/Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">160%</style> of ATK.

For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of DMG dealt by Class Skills (each attack counts only once), the next DMG instance additionally deals AoE Adaptive <style="physical">Attack/Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">208%</style> of ATK.

For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of DMG dealt by Class Skills (each attack counts only once), the next DMG instance additionally deals AoE Adaptive <style="physical">Attack/Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">256%</style> of ATK.

For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of DMG dealt by Class Skills (each attack counts only once), the next DMG instance additionally deals AoE Adaptive <style="physical">Attack/Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">304%</style> of ATK.

For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of DMG dealt by Class Skills (each attack counts only once), the next DMG instance additionally deals AoE Adaptive <style="physical">Attack/Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">352%</style> of ATK.

For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of DMG dealt by Class Skills (each attack counts only once), the next DMG instance additionally deals AoE Adaptive <style="physical">Attack/Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">400%</style> of ATK.

3977.name: Killer Arachnocrab
3977.description:
Summons Elite: Killer Arachnocrab to deal Attack DMG.
After casting, you gain full passive stacks for a period of time, during which they do not decrease.
passiveBufDescriptions:
When damage triggers a Lucky Strike, it may activate a "Luck effect": Causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Attack DMG equal to 11.2% of ATK (CD: 0.1s).
Each successful trigger increases the Elemental DMG of this Luck effect by 4%, stacking up to 10 times, lasting 0.5s.

When damage triggers a Lucky Strike, it may activate a "Luck effect": Causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Attack DMG equal to 14.56% of ATK (CD: 0.1s).
Each successful trigger increases the Elemental DMG of this Luck effect by 5.2%, stacking up to 10 times, lasting 0.5s.

When damage triggers a Lucky Strike, it may activate a "Luck effect": Causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Attack DMG equal to 17.92% of ATK (CD: 0.1s).
Each successful trigger increases the Elemental DMG of this Luck effect by 6.4%, stacking up to 10 times, lasting 0.5s.

When damage triggers a Lucky Strike, it may activate a "Luck effect": Causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Attack DMG equal to 21.28% of ATK (CD: 0.1s).
Each successful trigger increases the Elemental DMG of this Luck effect by 7.6%, stacking up to 10 times, lasting 0.5s.

When damage triggers a Lucky Strike, it may activate a "Luck effect": Causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Attack DMG equal to 24.64% of ATK (CD: 0.1s).
Each successful trigger increases the Elemental DMG of this Luck effect by 8.8%, stacking up to 10 times, lasting 0.5s.

When damage triggers a Lucky Strike, it may activate a "Luck effect": Causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Attack DMG equal to 28% of ATK (CD: 0.1s).
Each successful trigger increases the Elemental DMG of this Luck effect by 10%, stacking up to 10 times, lasting 0.5s.

3978.name: Verdant Fang
3978.description:
Summons Elite: Verdant Fang to deal Attack DMG.
For a period of time after casting, each Class Skill used reduces your remaining Ultimate CD (triggers up to once every 1s).
passiveBufDescriptions: Ultimate DMG <style="accent-gn">+12%</style>.
Ultimate DMG <style="accent-gn">+15.6%</style>.
Ultimate DMG <style="accent-gn">+19.2%</style>.
Ultimate DMG <style="accent-gn">+22.8%</style>.
Ultimate DMG <style="accent-gn">+26.4%</style>.
Ultimate DMG <style="accent-gn">+30%</style>.

3979.name: Man-Eating Furball
3979.description:
Summons Elite: Man-Eating Furball to deal Attack DMG.
After casting, your Fire Bonus is temporarily increased.

3980.name: Dogorman
3980.description:
Summons Elite: Dogorman, dealing Attack DMG equal to a percentage of your HP.
After casting, your HP is also temporarily increased.

3981.name: Sanctuary Eye
3981.description:
Summons Elite: Sanctuary Eye to deal Attack DMG.
After casting, grants a Shield to yourself and up to 10 nearby allies for a period of time (prioritizes teammates).

3982.name: Lucy
3982.description:
Transform into Celestial Spirit Mage - Lucy, replacing your skill set while gaining Ability Conversion.
Passive: Dealing damage converts 50% of the damage dealt into healing for up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates).
1. Fleuve d'Étoiles: Manifests the Fleuve d'Étoiles and swings it continuously, dealing Light Magic DMG to targets.
2. Celestial Guardian: Harnesses the power of Celestial Spirits to grant a shield lasting 20s to up to 10 allies within range (prioritizing teammates). Simultaneously inflicts debuffs on up to 5 enemies within range, reducing ATK, applying Vulnerability, and reducing Element Resistance for 10s.
3. Aqua Metria: Draws upon the power of Aquarius to unleash waves forward, dealing Water Magic DMG to targets in their path, with an additional 50% of the damage dealt converted into healing.
activeEffectParams: Celestial Spirit Guard Elemental Resistance Reduction

Aqua Metria
Aqua Metria DMG per hit

3983.name: Natsu
3983.description:
Transform into Fire Dragon Slayer - Natsu, replacing your skill set while gaining Ability Conversion.
Passive: Casting skills other than an Ultimate Skill grants stacks of Dragon Flame based on the skill type. Every 10 stacks of Dragon Flame automatically converts into 1 stack of Dragon Force. Dragon Force can stack up to 5 times. Each stack of Dragon Force grants a Fire Bonus.
1. Fire Dragon's Iron Fist: Charges briefly before unleashing a blazing punch forward, dealing Fire Attack DMG and accumulating 5 stacks of Dragon Flame.
2. Fire Dragon's Wing Attack: Leaps fiercely and dashes forward, dealing Fire Attack DMG and accumulating 5 stacks of Dragon Flame.
3. Fire Dragon's Roar: Gathers the power of flames to spew a massive blast of fire forward, dealing Fire Attack DMG. If at max Dragon Force stacks, consumes all stacks of Dragon Force to gain CD reduction for Natsu's skills and a Fire Bonus. This effect persists for the duration of the current transformation and can stack up to 3 times.
activeEffectParams:
[Fire Dragon's Iron Fist]
Fire Dragon's Iron Fist DMG

[Fire Dragon's Wing Attack]
Fire Dragon's Wing Attack DMG

attrDescs.2202110: Further enhances the ability to use Wild Bloom. Wild Bloom, Regen Pulse, and ​Nature Ward​ grant Symbiotic Mark to allies. Symbiotic Mark: Lasts for 10s. When overhealing a target with Symbiotic Mark, if the overheal reaches 30% of their Max HP, the excess healing is converted into a regeneration effect lasting for 10s. This effect can trigger only once every 30s. Healing of Stillness: If the caster deals no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of the caster's Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies (party members prioritized), with the 4-hit combo restoring 12.6% Max HP in total. After using an Ultimate, Basic Attacks immediately start healing, but this effect is disabled upon dealing DMG to enemies. Capable of converting attacks into healing. Lucky Strikes from attacks trigger various healing effects, enhancing healing while increasing DMG dealt.
